## Phase OS — Per-Report List-Type Fields: 4 JSONB Arrays (EXPANDED)

**Research:** §2.215-E
**Scope:** Backend entity + migration + DTOs + service stamping + composable + dialog UI (CiProgressReportTab) + list-view expansion + standalone Remarks Log removal
**Risk:** Low — all additive; old text fields preserved for back-compat

### OS-A: Backend entity — add 4 JSONB properties to `ConstructionProgressReport`

File: `pmo-backend/src/database/entities/construction-progress-report.entity.ts`

Add after `mitigationActions`:
```typescript
@Property({ columnType: 'jsonb', nullable: true })
narrativeList: Array<{ text: string; createdAt: string; author?: string }> = [];

@Property({ columnType: 'jsonb', nullable: true })
remarksList: Array<{ text: string; createdAt: string; author?: string }> = [];

@Property({ columnType: 'jsonb', nullable: true })
issuesEncounteredList: Array<{ text: string; createdAt: string; author?: string }> = [];

@Property({ columnType: 'jsonb', nullable: true })
mitigationActionsList: Array<{ text: string; createdAt: string; author?: string }> = [];
```

### OS-B: Migration `Migration20260522040000_AddProgressReportRemarksList`

File: `pmo-backend/src/database/mikro-migrations/Migration20260522040000_AddProgressReportRemarksList.ts`

```typescript
import { Migration } from '@mikro-orm/migrations';

export class Migration20260522040000_AddProgressReportRemarksList extends Migration {
  isTransactional(): boolean { return true; }

  async up(): Promise<void> {
    this.addSql(`
      ALTER TABLE construction_progress_reports
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS narrative_list JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS remarks_list JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS issues_encountered_list JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]',
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS mitigation_actions_list JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]';
    `);
  }

  async down(): Promise<void> {
    this.addSql(`
      ALTER TABLE construction_progress_reports
        DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS narrative_list,
        DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS remarks_list,
        DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS issues_encountered_list,
        DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS mitigation_actions_list;
    `);
  }
}
```

### OS-C: DTOs — `create-progress-report.dto.ts` + `update-progress-report.dto.ts`

Add import `IsArray` (already imported in file; verify).

In `CreateProgressReportDto`, add after the existing string fields:
```typescript
@IsOptional()
@IsArray()
narrative_list?: Array<{ text: string; author?: string; created_at?: string }>;

@IsOptional()
@IsArray()
remarks_list?: Array<{ text: string; author?: string; created_at?: string }>;

@IsOptional()
@IsArray()
issues_encountered_list?: Array<{ text: string; author?: string; created_at?: string }>;

@IsOptional()
@IsArray()
mitigation_actions_list?: Array<{ text: string; author?: string; created_at?: string }>;
```

`UpdateProgressReportDto` inherits all via `PartialType(CreateProgressReportDto)` — no direct changes needed (verify PartialType is used).

### OS-D: Service stamping — `construction-projects.service.ts`

In `createProgressReport()` and `updateProgressReport()`: before calling `em.persist()`, pre-process each list field:

```typescript
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const stampList = (items: any[] | undefined, user?: any) =>
  (items || []).map(entry => ({
    text: entry.text || '',
    author: entry.author || user?.name || 'System',
    createdAt: entry.created_at || entry.createdAt || now,
  }));

entity.narrativeList = stampList(dto.narrative_list, callingUser);
entity.remarksList = stampList(dto.remarks_list, callingUser);
entity.issuesEncounteredList = stampList(dto.issues_encountered_list, callingUser);
entity.mitigationActionsList = stampList(dto.mitigation_actions_list, callingUser);
```

Wrap in try/catch per fire-and-forget pattern — stamp failure MUST NOT abort the save.

### OS-E: Composable — `useCoiProgressReports.ts`

Add to `ProgressReport` interface:
```typescript
narrativeList: Array<{ text: string; createdAt: string; author?: string }>;
remarksList: Array<{ text: string; createdAt: string; author?: string }>;
issuesEncounteredList: Array<{ text: string; createdAt: string; author?: string }>;
mitigationActionsList: Array<{ text: string; createdAt: string; author?: string }>;
```

Add to `normalize(r)`:
```typescript
narrativeList: r.narrativeList ?? r.narrative_list ?? [],
remarksList: r.remarksList ?? r.remarks_list ?? [],
issuesEncounteredList: r.issuesEncounteredList ?? r.issues_encountered_list ?? [],
mitigationActionsList: r.mitigationActionsList ?? r.mitigation_actions_list ?? [],
```

### OS-F: Dialog form state — `CiProgressReportTab.vue`

In `blank()`, add:
```typescript
narrative_items: [] as string[],
remarks_items: [] as string[],
issues_items: [] as string[],
mitigation_items: [] as string[],
```

In `openEdit(r)`:
```typescript
form.value.narrative_items = r.narrativeList.map(x => x.text);
form.value.remarks_items = r.remarksList.map(x => x.text);
form.value.issues_items = r.issuesEncounteredList.map(x => x.text);
form.value.mitigation_items = r.mitigationActionsList.map(x => x.text);
```

In `save()` payload assembly — convert back to stamped objects:
```typescript
const toListPayload = (texts: string[], existing: any[]) =>
  texts.filter(t => t.trim()).map((t, i) => ({
    text: t,
    created_at: existing[i]?.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
    author: existing[i]?.author,
  }));

payload.narrative_list = toListPayload(form.value.narrative_items, editing.value?.narrativeList ?? []);
payload.remarks_list = toListPayload(form.value.remarks_items, editing.value?.remarksList ?? []);
payload.issues_encountered_list = toListPayload(form.value.issues_items, editing.value?.issuesEncounteredList ?? []);
payload.mitigation_actions_list = toListPayload(form.value.mitigation_items, editing.value?.mitigationActionsList ?? []);
```

### OS-G: Dialog template — 4 CiBulletListInput sections

In the add/edit dialog, below the existing textarea fields, add a section (use `<v-divider class="my-3" />` separator):

```vue
<v-divider class="my-3" />
<div class="text-subtitle-2 mb-2">Narrative</div>
<CiBulletListInput v-model="form.narrative_items" placeholder="Add narrative entry..." />

<div class="text-subtitle-2 mt-3 mb-2">Remarks</div>
<CiBulletListInput v-model="form.remarks_items" placeholder="Add remark..." />

<div class="text-subtitle-2 mt-3 mb-2">Issues / Risks Encountered</div>
<CiBulletListInput v-model="form.issues_items" placeholder="Add issue or risk..." />

<div class="text-subtitle-2 mt-3 mb-2">Mitigation Actions</div>
<CiBulletListInput v-model="form.mitigation_items" placeholder="Add mitigation action..." />
```

Add explicit import at top of `<script setup>`:
```typescript
import CiBulletListInput from '~/components/coi/CiBulletListInput.vue'
```

### OS-H: List-view expanded card — render list fields

In the existing expandable section of each list-view card (the `v-expand-transition` area), add rendering for each list field:

```vue
<template v-if="r.narrativeList?.length">
  <div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 mb-1 mt-2">Narrative</div>
  <ul class="pl-4">
    <li v-for="(item, i) in r.narrativeList" :key="i" class="text-body-2">{{ item.text }}</li>
  </ul>
</template>
<!-- same pattern for remarksList, issuesEncounteredList, mitigationActionsList -->

```

In `pages/coi/edit-[id].vue` Progress tab, locate and delete the standalone Remarks Log `<v-card>` wrapper (wraps `<CiRemarksLog>` or inline `v-textarea` for `remarks_log_entries`). ## Phase OU — Detail Page: Enterprise Summary Card + Overview Tab Collapsible Restructure

**Research:** §2.215-A + §2.215-B + §2.215-F
**Scope:** `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/detail-[id].vue` + `pmo-frontend/utils/adapters.ts`
**Risk:** Medium — template restructure of existing detail page; all data bindings preserved, no backend changes

### OU-A: Adapter gap fix — add RDP/0+8/LIKHA fields to `UIProjectDetail`

File: `pmo-frontend/utils/adapters.ts`

In `UIProjectDetail` interface, add after `outcomeIndicators`:
```typescript
rdpAlignment: any[];
socioeconomicAgenda: any[];
csuLikhaGoals: any[];
```

In `adaptProjectDetail`, add after `outcomeIndicators` mapping:
```typescript
rdpAlignment: backend.rdp_alignment || [],
socioeconomicAgenda: backend.socioeconomic_agenda || [],
csuLikhaGoals: backend.csu_likha_goals || [],
```

No backend changes. `findOne` already returns `cp.*` which includes these JSONB columns.

### OU-B: Enterprise summary card — insert between guide card and v-tabs

File: `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/detail-[id].vue`

Locate the `<CiProjectGuideCard ...>` element and the `<v-tabs v-model="activeTab">` that follows it. Between them, insert a new summary card (only when `project` is loaded, inside `<template v-if="project">`):

```vue
<!-- OU-B: Enterprise project summary card (above tabs) -->
<v-card v-if="project" variant="outlined" class="mb-3 mt-1" rounded="lg">
  <!-- TOP ROW: identity chips -->
  <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-center ga-2 px-4 pt-3 pb-2 bg-grey-lighten-5 border-b">
    <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" :color="getStatusColor(project.status)" prepend-icon="mdi-circle-slice-8">
      {{ project.status }}
    </v-chip>
    <v-chip v-if="project.projectStatusCategory" size="small" variant="outlined" color="secondary" prepend-icon="mdi-tag-outline">
      {{ project.projectStatusCategory }}
    </v-chip>
    <v-chip v-if="project.campus" size="small" variant="text" prepend-icon="mdi-office-building-outline">
      {{ project.campus }}
    </v-chip>
    <v-spacer />
    <v-chip v-if="project.totalContractAmount" size="small" variant="tonal" color="success" prepend-icon="mdi-cash-multiple">
      {{ formatCurrency(project.totalContractAmount) }}
    </v-chip>
  </div>
  <!-- BODY: 2-column metadata grid -->
  <v-row no-gutters class="px-2 py-2">
    <!-- LEFT: Contract / Schedule metadata -->
    <v-col cols="12" md="6" class="pa-2">
      <v-list density="compact" class="py-0">
        <v-list-item v-if="project.contractor" prepend-icon="mdi-account-hard-hat" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Contractor</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ project.contractor }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
        <v-list-item v-if="project.fundSource" prepend-icon="mdi-bank-outline" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Funding Source</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle class="text-body-2">{{ project.fundSource }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
        <v-list-item v-if="project.startDate" prepend-icon="mdi-calendar-start" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Start Date</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle class="text-body-2">{{ formatDate(project.startDate) }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
        <v-list-item v-if="project.targetCompletionDate" prepend-icon="mdi-calendar-check" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Target Completion</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle class="text-body-2">{{ formatDate(project.targetCompletionDate) }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
      </v-list>
    </v-col>
    <!-- RIGHT: Personnel / Progress metadata -->
    <v-col cols="12" md="6" class="pa-2" style="border-left: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)">
      <v-list density="compact" class="py-0">
        <v-list-item v-if="project.projectManager" prepend-icon="mdi-account-tie" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Project Manager</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ project.projectManager }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
        <v-list-item v-if="project.projectEngineer" prepend-icon="mdi-hard-hat" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Project Engineer</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ project.projectEngineer }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
        <v-list-item prepend-icon="mdi-hammer-wrench" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Physical Progress</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle>
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
              <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-bold text-primary">{{ project.physicalProgress }}%</span>
              <v-progress-linear :model-value="project.physicalProgress" color="primary" height="6" rounded style="max-width: 120px" />
            </div>
          </v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
        <v-list-item prepend-icon="mdi-currency-usd" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Financial Progress</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle>
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
              <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-bold text-info">{{ project.financialProgress }}%</span>
              <v-progress-linear :model-value="project.financialProgress" color="info" height="6" rounded style="max-width: 120px" />
            </div>
          </v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
        <v-list-item v-if="progressSummary.daysRemaining != null" prepend-icon="mdi-timer-sand" class="px-2 py-1">
          <v-list-item-title class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1">Days Remaining</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle>
            <v-chip
              size="x-small"
              :color="progressSummary.daysRemaining <= 0 ? 'error' : progressSummary.daysRemaining <= 30 ? 'warning' : 'success'"
              variant="tonal"
            >{{ progressSummary.daysRemaining <= 0 ? 'Overdue' : `${progressSummary.daysRemaining} days` }}</v-chip>
          </v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
      </v-list>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</v-card>
```

**Key implementation notes:**
- `CiProjectHeroCard` is REMOVED from the overview tab body (data now in enterprise summary card OU-B)
- The profile images card and publication status strip STAY at top of overview tab (above the panels)
- All existing computed refs and data bindings are preserved — only template restructuring
- `overviewPanelsLeft` + `overviewPanelsRight` refs replaced by `overviewPanels`
- Strategic Alignment chips: render `project.rdpAlignment` / `project.socioeconomicAgenda` / `project.csuLikhaGoals` as read-only chip groups; if the value is an array of strings, render directly; if array of objects, use `.title` or `.label` property

After overview tab restructure, confirm Timeline, Progress, Analytics, Gallery, Documents, Team, Others tabs still render and fetch data correctly. The restructure touches only `<v-window-item value="overview">` and the refs `overviewPanelsLeft/Right`.

## Phase OT — Verification & Closure (Updated Scope)

**Scope covers:** OR + OS + OU

### OT-A: Backend
- `tsc --noEmit` clean in `pmo-backend/`
- Migration `Migration20260522040000_AddProgressReportRemarksList` applied successfully (`npm run migration:up`)
- POST/PATCH `/api/construction-projects/:id/progress-reports` accepts `narrative_list`, `remarks_list`, `issues_encountered_list`, `mitigation_actions_list` arrays and persists with timestamps

### OT-B: Frontend type check
- `vue-tsc --noEmit` in `pmo-frontend/` — zero new errors
- Confirm `UIProjectDetail.rdpAlignment` / `socioeconomicAgenda` / `csuLikhaGoals` resolve correctly

### OT-C: Operator visual verification checklist

**OR verification:**
- [ ] CiRevisionOrdersTable list-view: action buttons (MOV / expand / edit / delete) appear in a horizontal row, not a vertical stack
- [ ] CiProgressReportTab list-view: same horizontal button layout
- [ ] Center stat cells: left-aligned, even gap spacing, no U-shape perception

**OS verification:**
- [ ] Progress Report add/edit dialog: Narrative, Remarks, Issues, Mitigation sections each show CiBulletListInput
- [ ] Add entries to each list field → save → reload → entries persist with content
- [ ] Existing plain-text `remarks` / `issuesEncountered` / `mitigationActions` fields still display in expanded card (back-compat)
- [ ] Standalone Remarks Log card no longer visible on the Progress Report tab in edit-[id].vue

**OU verification:**
- [ ] Enterprise summary card appears between guide card and tabs on detail page
- [ ] Summary card shows: status chip / contractor / funding source / start & target dates / PM / PE / physical% / financial% / days remaining
- [ ] Overview tab shows 8 collapsible panels (Project Profile + Dates & Duration open by default)
- [ ] Strategic Alignment panel renders RDP/0+8/LIKHA chips (or dash if empty)
- [ ] All other tabs (Progress, Timeline, Analytics, Gallery, Documents, Team, Others) unaffected

### OT-D: Closure
- Update plan.md header tracker: `OQ ✅ | OR ✅ | OS ✅ | OU ✅ | OT ✅`
- Update research.md §2.215 closure note
- MJ PAUSED → resume authorization signal

## Phase OY — `useMovSafe` Composable
**Directive:** §2.217-D findings. Zero-dependency frontend validation composable.

### OY-A: Create composable
**File (new):** `pmo-frontend/composables/useMovSafe.ts`

```ts
import { useToast } from '~/composables/useToast'

const URL_REGEX = /^https?:\/\/.+\..+/i

export type MovState = 'valid' | 'empty' | 'invalid'

const MOV_MESSAGES: Record<Exclude<MovState, 'valid'>, string> = {
  empty:   'No MOV link has been provided for this record.',
  invalid: 'The MOV link appears to be invalid or malformed.',
}

export function useMovSafe() {
  const toast = useToast()

  function resolveMovState(url?: string | null): MovState {
    if (!url || !url.trim()) return 'empty'
    if (!URL_REGEX.test(url.trim())) return 'invalid'
    return 'valid'
  }

  function openMovSafely(url?: string | null): void {
    const state = resolveMovState(url)
    if (state === 'valid') {
      window.open(url!.trim(), '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer')
    } else {
      toast.error(MOV_MESSAGES[state])
    }
  }

  function openFileSafely(path?: string | null, label?: string): void {
    if (!path || !path.trim()) {
      toast.error('The MOV file reference is no longer available or has not been attached.')
      return
    }
    window.open(path.trim(), '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer')
  }

  return { resolveMovState, openMovSafely, openFileSafely }
}
```

---

## Phase OZ — `CiMovLinkBtn.vue` Component
**Directive:** §2.217-E findings. Single reusable MOV button replacing all 8 raw anchor tags.

### OZ-A: Create component
**File (new):** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiMovLinkBtn.vue`

Props:
- `url?: string | null` — the MOV URL or file path
- `isFile?: boolean` — if true, uses `openFileSafely` (default false)
- `iconOnly?: boolean` — icon-only button (default true)
- `size?: string` — default `'x-small'`
- `color?: string` — default `'primary'`
- `label?: string` — button/tooltip label (default `'View MOV'`)

Behavior:
- When url is empty/invalid: renders with `color="grey-darken-1"` + tooltip "No MOV provided"
- When url is valid: renders with `color={color}` + tooltip showing trimmed url
- Click always calls `openMovSafely` or `openFileSafely` (toast on failure)
- `iconOnly=true`: renders `<v-btn icon size="{size}" variant="text">` with `mdi-link-variant` (url) or `mdi-paperclip` (file)
- `iconOnly=false`: renders `<v-btn prepend-icon variant="text" size="{size}">{{ label }}</v-btn>`

---

```html
</a>
```

```html
</a>
```

Replace:
```html
<a :href="e.filePath" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="text-teal text-decoration-none">
  {{ e.fileName || e.movTitle }}
</a>
```
With a clickable span + `openFileSafely`:
```html
<span
  class="text-teal text-decoration-none"
  style="cursor: pointer"

>{{ e.fileName || e.movTitle }}</span>
```
(CiMovEvidenceSection handles its own click logic via `useMovSafe` directly — not CiMovLinkBtn, since the title is the clickable text here.)

### PA-7: `CiMovEvidenceSection.vue` — URL entry (line ~245)

```html

  {{ e.movTitle }}
</a>
```
With:
```html
<span
  class="text-primary text-decoration-none"
  style="cursor: pointer"
  @click="openMovSafely(e.movLink)"
>{{ e.movTitle }}</span>
```

### PA-8: `edit-[id].vue` — MOV list render (line ~2841)
Replace:
```html
<a :href="mov.movLink" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="text-decoration-none">
  {{ mov.movTitle }}
</a>
```
With:
```html
<span
  class="text-primary text-decoration-none"
  style="cursor: pointer"
  @click="openMovSafely(mov.movLink)"
>{{ mov.movTitle }}</span>
```
(CiMovEvidenceSection and edit page use composable directly since clickable text ≠ icon button)

```html
<v-card class="mb-4 h-100">

```

```html
<v-card class="mb-4 h-100" elevation="1" border rounded="lg">
```

### PC-D: Milestones list → bordered card items

Replace `v-list lines="three" density="comfortable"` + `v-list-item class="border-b"` pattern with card-per-item:

```html
<!-- BEFORE -->
<v-list v-else lines="three" density="comfortable">
  <v-list-item v-for="(m, idx) in pagedEditMilestones" :key="m.id || idx" class="border-b">
    <template #prepend>
      <v-avatar :color="getMilestoneStatusColor(m.status)" size="36" variant="tonal">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-flag" size="small" />
      </v-avatar>
    </template>
    <v-list-item-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2 flex-wrap">
      ...
    </v-list-item-title>
    <v-list-item-subtitle>...</v-list-item-subtitle>
    <template #append>...</template>
  </v-list-item>
</v-list>
```

```html
<!-- AFTER -->
<div v-else class="d-flex flex-column ga-2">
  <v-card
    v-for="(m, idx) in pagedEditMilestones"
    :key="m.id || idx"
    elevation="1"
    border
    rounded="lg"
    class="overflow-hidden"
    :style="`border-left: 3px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-${getMilestoneStatusColor(m.status)}), 0.7)`"
  >
    <div class="d-flex align-start pa-3 ga-3">
      <!-- Left: avatar -->
      <v-avatar :color="getMilestoneStatusColor(m.status)" size="36" variant="tonal" class="flex-shrink-0">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-flag" size="small" />
      </v-avatar>
      <!-- Center: content -->
      <div class="flex-grow-1 min-width-0">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 flex-wrap mb-1">
          <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ m.title }}</span>
          <v-chip :color="getMilestoneStatusColor(m.status)" size="x-small" variant="tonal">{{ m.status }}</v-chip>
          <v-chip v-if="m.category" size="x-small" variant="outlined">{{ m.category }}</v-chip>
        </div>
        <div class="text-caption text-grey mb-1">
          <template v-if="m.startDate">{{ formatMilestoneDate(m.startDate) }} → </template>
          {{ formatMilestoneDate(m.targetDate) }}
          <template v-if="m.actualDate"> (actual {{ formatMilestoneDate(m.actualDate) }})</template>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 mb-1">
          <v-progress-linear
            :model-value="m.progress"
            :color="m.progress >= 100 ? 'success' : 'primary'"
            height="6" rounded style="max-width: 200px;"
          />
          <span class="text-caption font-weight-medium">{{ m.progress }}%</span>
        </div>
        <div v-if="m.description" class="text-body-2 text-grey-darken-1">{{ m.description }}</div>
        <div v-if="m.remarks" class="text-caption text-grey mt-1"><strong>Remarks:</strong> {{ m.remarks }}</div>
      </div>
      <!-- Right: actions -->
      <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-1 flex-shrink-0">
        <v-btn icon="mdi-pencil" size="small" variant="text" color="primary" @click="openEditMilestone(m)" />
        <v-btn icon="mdi-delete" size="small" variant="text" color="error"
          :loading="deletingMilestone[m.id]" @click="confirmDeleteMilestone(m)" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </v-card>
</div>
```

### PC-E: Project Diary list → bordered card items

Same pattern as PC-D. Replace `v-list density="comfortable" class="pa-0"` + `v-list-item class="border-b"` with:

```html
<div v-else class="d-flex flex-column ga-2">
  <v-card
    v-for="e in pagedEditWorkLogs"
    :key="e.id"
    elevation="1"
    border
    rounded="lg"
    class="overflow-hidden"
    style="border-left: 3px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-info), 0.7)"
  >
    <div class="d-flex align-start pa-3 ga-3">
      <!-- Left: avatar -->
      <v-avatar :color="getEntryTypeColor(e.entryType)" size="36" class="flex-shrink-0">
        <v-icon size="small" color="white">mdi-calendar-text</v-icon>
      </v-avatar>
      <!-- Center: content -->
      <div class="flex-grow-1 min-width-0">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 flex-wrap mb-1">
          <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ e.title }}</span>
          <v-chip :color="getEntryTypeColor(e.entryType)" size="x-small" variant="tonal">{{ e.entryType }}</v-chip>
        </div>
        <span class="text-caption text-grey">{{ e.entryDate }}{{ e.periodLabel ? ` · ${e.periodLabel}` : '' }}</span>
        <div v-if="e.description" class="text-body-2 text-grey-darken-1 mt-1">{{ e.description }}</div>
        <div class="text-caption text-grey mt-1 d-flex flex-wrap ga-2">
          <span v-if="e.weather"><v-icon size="x-small">mdi-weather-partly-cloudy</v-icon> {{ e.weather }}</span>
          <span v-if="e.manpowerCount != null"><v-icon size="x-small">mdi-account-multiple</v-icon> {{ e.manpowerCount }} workers</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Right: actions -->
      <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-1 flex-shrink-0">
        <v-btn icon="mdi-pencil" size="small" variant="text" class="me-1" @click="openEditDiary(e)" />
        <v-btn icon="mdi-delete" size="small" variant="text" color="error"
          :loading="!!deletingDiary[e.id]" @click="confirmDeleteDiary(e)" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </v-card>
</div>
```

## Phase MJ — Personnel Groups (Non-System JSONB Rows)

**Branch:** pmo-coi
**Status:** ✅ COMPLETE (2026-05-26 verification) — MJ-A/B/C/E implemented; MJ-D/F/G superseded by Phase PA (CiPersonnelAccessCard replaced 3-group JSONB card across all 3 pages)

### Directive Summary

Replace the legacy project_engineer + project_manager text-field Card 1 in the Personnel tab (edit-[id].vue and new.vue) with three structured dynamic-row group sections stored in `personnel_groups` JSONB. All 3 pages synchronized. **No backend changes required** — `personnel_groups` column, INSERT/UPDATE service logic, and DTO all already exist.

**Preserved (unchanged):**
- `form.project_engineer` — rendered in Basic Info tab via CiBasicInfoForm; stays in form state
- `form.project_manager` — legacy back-compat hydration only; not rendered in Personnel tab UI
- Card 2 (Assigned Staff `v-autocomplete`) in Personnel tab — fully preserved

**File:** `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/edit-[id].vue`

**Step 1 — Extend coiFormState import (line 3):**
```ts
// Before:
import { PERSONNEL_GROUPS, PERSONNEL_CATEGORY_OPTIONS, KEY_DOC_TYPECODES } from '~/utils/coiFormState'
// After:
import { PERSONNEL_GROUPS, PERSONNEL_CATEGORY_OPTIONS, KEY_DOC_TYPECODES, type CsuPersonnelRow, type ContractorPersonnelRow, type OthersPersonnelRow } from '~/utils/coiFormState'
```

**Step 2 — Add 3 ref arrays** after `signatoryRows` (~line 152):
```ts
const csuPersonnelRows        = ref<CsuPersonnelRow[]>([])
const contractorPersonnelRows = ref<ContractorPersonnelRow[]>([])
const othersPersonnelRows     = ref<OthersPersonnelRow[]>([])
```

**Step 3 — Hydration in `loadProject()`** after existing JSONB block (~line 411):
```ts
// MJ: Hydrate personnel_groups; fall back to legacy text fields for CSU rows
const pg = (p as any).personnel_groups || {}
csuPersonnelRows.value = (pg.csu && pg.csu.length)
  ? pg.csu
  : [
      ...(p.project_engineer ? [{ name: p.project_engineer, position: 'Project Engineer', role: '' }] : []),
      ...(p.project_manager  ? [{ name: p.project_manager,  position: 'Project Manager',  role: '' }] : []),
    ]
contractorPersonnelRows.value = pg.contractor || []
othersPersonnelRows.value = pg.others || []
```

**Step 4 — Payload mapping** add to `buildPayload()` after `escalation_records` (~line 656):
```ts
      personnel_groups: {
        csu: csuPersonnelRows.value,
        contractor: contractorPersonnelRows.value,
        others: othersPersonnelRows.value,
      },
```

**Step 5 — Update `tabCompletion.personnel`** (~line 450):
```ts
// Replace:
  personnel: !!(
    form.value.project_engineer ||
    form.value.project_manager ||
    (form.value.assigned_user_ids && form.value.assigned_user_ids.length > 0)
  ),
// With:
  personnel: !!(
    csuPersonnelRows.value.length > 0 ||
    contractorPersonnelRows.value.length > 0 ||
    othersPersonnelRows.value.length > 0 ||
    (form.value.assigned_user_ids && form.value.assigned_user_ids.length > 0)
  ),
```

### Phase MJ-D — edit-[id].vue Template Changes

**File:** `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/edit-[id].vue`
**Target:** `<v-window-item value="personnel">` Card 1 (lines ~2397–2422)

**Replace** the legacy Card 1 (`<v-card class="mb-4"><v-card-title>Personnel</v-card-title>` through its closing `</v-card>`) with:

```html
<!-- MJ (2026-05-22): Non-system personnel groups replacing legacy text fields -->
<v-card class="mb-4" elevation="1" border rounded="lg">
  <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2 py-2 px-4 bg-grey-lighten-4">
    <v-icon size="small" icon="mdi-account-hard-hat" color="primary" />
    <span class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-medium">Project Personnel</span>
  </v-card-title>
  <v-divider />
  <v-card-text class="pa-4 d-flex flex-column ga-4">

    <!-- Group A: CSU Personnel -->
    <v-sheet rounded="lg" border class="pa-3">
      <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between mb-2">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
          <v-icon size="small" color="primary" icon="mdi-school-outline" />
          <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-semibold">CSU Personnel</span>
        </div>
        <v-btn size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-plus"
          @click="csuPersonnelRows.push({ name: '', position: '', role: '' })">Add</v-btn>
      </div>
      <div v-if="csuPersonnelRows.length === 0" class="text-caption text-grey">No CSU personnel recorded.</div>
      <v-row v-for="(row, i) in csuPersonnelRows" :key="i" dense class="align-center">
        <v-col cols="12" sm="4">
          <v-text-field v-model="row.name" label="Name" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="12" sm="4">
          <v-text-field v-model="row.position" label="Position / Designation" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="12" sm="3">
          <v-text-field v-model="row.role" label="Role (optional)" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="auto">
          <v-btn icon="mdi-delete" size="x-small" variant="text" color="error" @click="csuPersonnelRows.splice(i, 1)" />
        </v-col>
      </v-row>
    </v-sheet>

    <!-- Group B: Contractor Personnel -->
    <v-sheet rounded="lg" border class="pa-3">
      <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between mb-2">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
          <v-icon size="small" color="warning" icon="mdi-hammer-wrench" />
          <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-semibold">Contractor Personnel</span>
        </div>
        <v-btn size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="warning" prepend-icon="mdi-plus"
          @click="contractorPersonnelRows.push({ name: '', position: '', company: '' })">Add</v-btn>
      </div>
      <div v-if="contractorPersonnelRows.length === 0" class="text-caption text-grey">No contractor personnel recorded.</div>
      <v-row v-for="(row, i) in contractorPersonnelRows" :key="i" dense class="align-center">
        <v-col cols="12" sm="4">
          <v-text-field v-model="row.name" label="Name" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="12" sm="4">
          <v-text-field v-model="row.position" label="Position" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="12" sm="3">
          <v-text-field v-model="row.company" label="Company" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="auto">
          <v-btn icon="mdi-delete" size="x-small" variant="text" color="error" @click="contractorPersonnelRows.splice(i, 1)" />
        </v-col>
      </v-row>
    </v-sheet>

    <!-- Group C: Others -->
    <v-sheet rounded="lg" border class="pa-3">
      <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between mb-2">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
          <v-icon size="small" color="info" icon="mdi-account-multiple-outline" />

        </div>
        <v-btn size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="info" prepend-icon="mdi-plus"
          @click="othersPersonnelRows.push({ name: '', position: '', affiliation: '' })">Add</v-btn>
      </div>

      <v-row v-for="(row, i) in othersPersonnelRows" :key="i" dense class="align-center">

        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="12" sm="4">

        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="12" sm="3">
          <v-text-field v-model="row.affiliation" label="Affiliation / Agency" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="auto">
          <v-btn icon="mdi-delete" size="x-small" variant="text" color="error" @click="othersPersonnelRows.splice(i, 1)" />
        </v-col>
      </v-row>
    </v-sheet>

  </v-card-text>
</v-card>
```

# COI PERSONNEL & ACCESS CONTROL REFACTOR — Phases PA–PE

**Research Reference:** §2.216 (A–J)
**Plan Date:** 2026-05-22
**Branch:** pmo-coi
**Status:** ⬜ PHASE 2 COMPLETE — Awaiting RUN_ACE Phase 3 authorization

---

## Verification Gate (§2.216-A)

Before Phase 3 begins, operator must confirm:
- [ ] `npm run migration:up` applied in `pmo-backend/` — applies `Migration20260522040000_AddProgressReportRemarksList` (4 JSONB list columns on `construction_progress_reports`)
- [ ] MA–MJ, NA–NK, OA–OU operator visual verify passes (MJ-H checklist, OT-C checklist)

---

## Governance Directives (Phases PA–PE)

| ID | Directive |
|----|-----------|
| PA-D1 | `contractor_users` table is COMPLETELY ISOLATED from `users`. No shared FK, no join in institutional queries. Contractor JWT payload uses `{ sub: "contractor:<id>", type: "contractor" }` — different from institutional `{ sub: "<userId>", type: "user" }`. |
| PA-D2 | `personnel_groups` JSONB column on `construction_projects` is DEPRECATED but NOT deleted. PA stops writing it from UI. Schema column retained for back-compat. |
| PA-D3 | `CiPersonnelAccessCard.vue` is the SINGLE reusable component for all three pages (edit, new, detail). No per-page divergence. |
| PA-D4 | Default permission for any new non-Admin assignment is VIEWER ONLY (`canEdit: false, canUpload: false, canApprove: false`). Only Admin/SuperAdmin can elevate. |
| PA-D5 | Hybrid ORM enforced: ORM for CRUD on new entities; raw SQL for assignment aggregation queries. |
| PA-D6 | `canEditPersonnel` in `useCoiAccess.ts` remains `isAdmin` — only Admins can manage assignments. Viewing the personnel list is open to all with project access. |
| PA-D7 | Contractor pages live under `/contractor/` route prefix — SEPARATE from `/coi/` institutional routes. `definePageMeta({ layout: 'contractor' })` — new minimal layout without institutional nav. |
| PA-D8 | `api.del()` not `api.delete()` for all DELETE calls. Unchanged COI directive. |

---

## Phase PA — Unified Personnel UI + RecordAssignment Permissions Extension

**Research:** §2.216-C, §2.216-E, §2.216-F
**Scope:** Backend (entity + migration + DTO + service) + Frontend (composable + new CiPersonnelAccessCard component + 3-page wiring)
**Risk:** Medium — replaces dual-track personnel system; data preserved

---

### PA-A: Backend — Extend `RecordAssignment` entity

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/database/entities/record-assignment.entity.ts`

Add after `personnelCategory`:
```typescript
// PA-A: Per-assignment project-level permission overrides
@Property({ columnType: 'jsonb', nullable: true })
permissions?: {
  canEdit?: boolean
  canUpload?: boolean
  canApprove?: boolean
  canAccessFinancials?: boolean
  canAccessOthers?: boolean
  canAccessPersonnel?: boolean
  tabs?: string[]
} | null;

// PA-A: Human-readable project role (distinct from system role)
@Property({ nullable: true, length: 100 })
projectRole?: string;
```

---

### PA-B: Migration `Migration20260523010000_ExtendRecordAssignmentPermissions`

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/database/mikro-migrations/Migration20260523010000_ExtendRecordAssignmentPermissions.ts`

```typescript
import { Migration } from '@mikro-orm/migrations';

export class Migration20260523010000_ExtendRecordAssignmentPermissions extends Migration {
  isTransactional(): boolean { return true; }

  async up(): Promise<void> {
    this.addSql(`
      ALTER TABLE record_assignments
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS permissions JSONB,
        ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS project_role VARCHAR(100);
    `);
  }

  async down(): Promise<void> {
    this.addSql(`
      ALTER TABLE record_assignments
        DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS permissions,
        DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS project_role;
    `);
  }
}
```

---

### PA-C: Backend — DTO + Assignment Service update

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/construction-projects/dto/` — update assignment-metadata DTO

In `assignment-metadata.dto.ts`, add:
```typescript
@IsOptional()
project_role?: string;

@IsOptional()
permissions?: {
  canEdit?: boolean
  canUpload?: boolean
  canApprove?: boolean
  canAccessFinancials?: boolean
  canAccessOthers?: boolean
  canAccessPersonnel?: boolean
  tabs?: string[]
}
```

In `construction-projects.service.ts` `updateAssignments()` method: when creating each `RecordAssignment`, map `a.project_role` → entity `projectRole` and `a.permissions` → entity `permissions`. Apply default permissions for non-Admin assignments:
```typescript
const defaultPerms = { canEdit: false, canUpload: false, canApprove: false,
  canAccessFinancials: false, canAccessOthers: false, canAccessPersonnel: false }
assignment.permissions = a.permissions ?? (isAdminAssignment ? null : defaultPerms)
```

---

### PA-D: Backend — `findOne` query update

In `findOne()` SELECT for `assigned_users`, expand `json_build_object` to include `project_role` and `permissions` from `record_assignments`:

```sql
json_build_object(
  'id', u.id,
  'name', u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name,
  'email', u.email,
  'role', ra.role,
  'department', ra.department,
  'phone', ra.phone,
  'personnel_category', ra.personnel_category,
  'project_role', ra.project_role,
  'permissions', ra.permissions
)
```

---

### PA-E: Frontend — Update `useCoiAccess.ts` to merge assignment permissions

**File:** `pmo-frontend/composables/useCoiAccess.ts`

After `isOwnerOrAssigned` computed, add:

```typescript
// PA-E: current user's assignment record with its permissions override
const myAssignment = computed(() => {
  const userId = authStore.user?.id
  if (!userId || !project.value) return null
  return (project.value.assignedUsers || []).find((u: any) => u.id === userId) ?? null
})

// PA-E: merge system-role permission with assignment-level override
const effectivePermissions = computed(() => {
  const base = { canEdit: isAdmin.value, canUpload: isAdmin.value, canApprove: isAdmin.value,
    canAccessFinancials: isAdmin.value, canAccessOthers: isAdmin.value, canAccessPersonnel: isAdmin.value }
  const override = myAssignment.value?.permissions
  if (!override) return base
  return { ...base, ...Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(override).filter(([_, v]) => v !== null)) }
})
```

Expose `effectivePermissions` and `myAssignment` from composable return.

Update `canEditCurrentProject` to also consult `effectivePermissions.canEdit` for non-Admins:
```typescript
const canEditCurrentProject = computed(() => {
  if (!project.value) return false
  if (isAdmin.value) return true
  return isOwnerOrAssigned.value && (effectivePermissions.value.canEdit ?? false)
})
```

---

### PA-G: Frontend — `CiPersonnelAccessCard.vue` (new shared component)

**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiPersonnelAccessCard.vue`

**Props:**
```typescript
defineProps<{
  projectId: string
  readOnly?: boolean
  assignedUsers?: AssignedUser[]  // current assignment list from project
}>()
```

**Layout — two-column within a single card:**

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ 👷 Personnel & Access Control                          [Add Person] │
├─────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ CSU / Institutional     │ Contractor Personnel                      │
│ ─────────────────────   │ ─────────────────────────────────────────  │
│ [Search user autocmp]   │ [Generate Invite Link]  [Invite history] │
│                         │                                           │
│ ┌─ Assigned User Card ─┐│ ┌─ Contractor Card ──────────────────┐   │
│ │ [Avatar] Name        ││ │ Name · Company                     │   │
│ │ Dept · Email         ││ │ Role · Status chip                 │   │
│ │ Role chip            ││ │ [Remove access]                    │   │
│ │ [Permissions panel]  ││ └────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│ │ [Remove]             │└───────────────────────────────────────────│
│ └──────────────────────┘                                           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Left panel behavior:**
- `v-autocomplete` async search of `/api/users/eligible-for-assignment` (existing endpoint)
- On select → show confirmation row with:
  - `v-select` for `personnelCategory` (IMPLEMENTING/MONITORING/UNIVERSITY_OFFICIAL/OVERSIGHT)
  - `v-text-field` for `projectRole` (free text, e.g. "Project Engineer")
  - Admin-only collapsible `v-expansion-panel` with permission checkboxes
  - [Assign] button → calls existing `/api/construction-projects/:id/assignments` endpoint
- Each assigned user rendered as a compact card: initials avatar + name + dept + role chip + category chip
- [Remove] button (Admin only) → calls `DELETE /api/construction-projects/:id/assignments/:userId`

**Right panel behavior (Phase PB integration point):**
- Placeholder in PA: "Contractor invite system — coming in Phase PB"
- In PB: populated with invite list + [Generate Invite] button

**Emits:** `@assignment-updated` → parent page refreshes project data

---

### PA-H: Replace dual-track Personnel tab with `CiPersonnelAccessCard` on all three pages

**edit-[id].vue:**
- Remove the two existing v-cards (MJ "Project Personnel" card + "Assigned Staff" card)
- Replace with: `<CiPersonnelAccessCard :project-id="projectId" :assigned-users="project?.assignedUsers ?? []" />`
- Keep `csuPersonnelRows`/`contractorPersonnelRows`/`othersPersonnelRows` refs temporarily (data preserved in backend until PA-D2 cleanup)

**new.vue:**
- Remove MJ "Project Personnel" card + "Assigned Staff" card
- Replace with: `<CiPersonnelAccessCard :project-id="''" :read-only="true" />`
- Note: Assignment requires an existing project ID. Show placeholder: "Personnel can be assigned after the project is saved."

**detail-[id].vue:**
- In Team tab: remove the MJ "Project Personnel" card (3 sheets for CSU/Contractor/Others)
- Replace with: `<CiPersonnelAccessCard :project-id="projectId" :assigned-users="project.assignedUsers" :read-only="true" />`

```
cd pmo-backend && npm run migration:up
```

## Phase PB — Contractor User System (Backend + Auth + Invite)

**Research:** §2.216-G, §2.216-D
**Scope:** New backend module `contractor-auth` + 3 new entities + 2 migrations + new frontend pages
**Risk:** High — new auth system; isolated from institutional auth

---

### PB-A: Backend — `ContractorUser` entity

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/contractor-auth/entities/contractor-user.entity.ts`

```typescript
@Entity({ tableName: 'contractor_users' })
export class ContractorUser {
  @PrimaryKey({ type: 'uuid', defaultRaw: 'gen_random_uuid()' })
  id!: string;

  @Property({ length: 255, unique: true })
  email!: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'text' })
  passwordHash?: string;

  @Property({ columnType: 'text' })
  fullName!: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, length: 255 })
  companyName?: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, length: 30 })
  phone?: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, length: 150 })
  position?: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, length: 255, unique: true })
  googleId?: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'text' })
  avatarUrl?: string;

  @Property({ length: 20, default: 'ACTIVE' })
  status: string = 'ACTIVE';

  @Property({ type: 'boolean', default: true })
  isActive: boolean = true;

  @Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  lastLoginAt?: Date;

  @Property({ defaultRaw: 'NOW()', columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  createdAt: Date = new Date();

  @Property({ defaultRaw: 'NOW()', onUpdate: () => new Date(), columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  updatedAt: Date = new Date();
}
```

---

### PB-B: Backend — `ContractorInviteToken` entity

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/contractor-auth/entities/contractor-invite-token.entity.ts`

```typescript
@Entity({ tableName: 'contractor_invite_tokens' })
export class ContractorInviteToken {
  @PrimaryKey({ type: 'uuid', defaultRaw: 'gen_random_uuid()' })
  id!: string;

  @Property({ columnType: 'uuid' })
  projectId!: string;

  @Property({ length: 64, unique: true })
  token!: string;  // 32-byte crypto.randomBytes hex

  @Property({ nullable: true, length: 255 })
  targetEmail?: string;

  @Property({ columnType: 'uuid' })
  createdBy!: string;  // FK users.id (institutional)

  @Property({ columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  expiresAt!: Date;

  @Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  acceptedAt?: Date;

  @Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'uuid' })
  acceptedBy?: string;  // FK contractor_users.id

  @Property({ length: 20, default: 'PENDING' })
  status: string = 'PENDING';  // PENDING | ACCEPTED | EXPIRED | REVOKED

  @Property({ defaultRaw: 'NOW()', columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  createdAt: Date = new Date();
}
```

---

### PB-C: Backend — `ProjectContractorAssignment` entity

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/contractor-auth/entities/project-contractor-assignment.entity.ts`

```typescript
@Entity({ tableName: 'project_contractor_assignments' })
export class ProjectContractorAssignment {
  @PrimaryKey({ type: 'uuid', defaultRaw: 'gen_random_uuid()' })
  id!: string;

  @Property({ columnType: 'uuid' })
  projectId!: string;

  @Property({ columnType: 'uuid' })
  contractorUserId!: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'uuid' })
  inviteTokenId?: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, length: 100 })
  role?: string;  // e.g. 'Contractor Admin', 'Site Engineer'

  @Property({ columnType: 'jsonb', nullable: true })
  permissions?: Record<string, any>;

  @Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'uuid' })
  assignedBy?: string;

  @Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  removedAt?: Date;

  @Property({ defaultRaw: 'NOW()', columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  assignedAt: Date = new Date();
}
```

---

### PB-D: Migration `Migration20260523020000_CreateContractorSystem`

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/database/mikro-migrations/Migration20260523020000_CreateContractorSystem.ts`

```sql
-- contractor_users
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash TEXT,
  full_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  company_name VARCHAR(255),
  phone VARCHAR(30),
  position VARCHAR(150),
  google_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,
  avatar_url TEXT,
  status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  last_login_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- contractor_invite_tokens
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contractor_invite_tokens (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES construction_projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  token VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  target_email VARCHAR(255),
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  accepted_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  accepted_by UUID REFERENCES contractor_users(id),
  status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- project_contractor_assignments
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_contractor_assignments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES construction_projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  contractor_user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES contractor_users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  invite_token_id UUID REFERENCES contractor_invite_tokens(id),
  role VARCHAR(100),
  permissions JSONB,
  assigned_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  assigned_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  removed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  UNIQUE(project_id, contractor_user_id)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_contractor_invite_token ON contractor_invite_tokens(token);
CREATE INDEX idx_contractor_assignments_project ON project_contractor_assignments(project_id);
```

---

### PB-E: Backend — `ContractorAuthModule`

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/contractor-auth/`

Service methods:
- `register(dto)` → hash password, create `ContractorUser`, return JWT
- `login(email, password)` → verify hash, return JWT with `{ sub: "contractor:<id>", type: "contractor" }`
- `generateInvite(projectId, createdBy, targetEmail?, ttlHours?)` → create `ContractorInviteToken` with `crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex')`, `expiresAt = now + ttlHours`
- `acceptInvite(token, contractorUserId)` → verify token not expired/accepted → create `ProjectContractorAssignment` → mark token ACCEPTED
- `getProjectContractors(projectId)` → return contractor assignments for a project

Controller routes:
- `POST /api/contractor/auth/register`
- `POST /api/contractor/auth/login`
- `POST /api/construction-projects/:id/contractor-invites` (Admin only — generate invite)
- `GET  /api/construction-projects/:id/contractor-invites` (Admin only — list invites)
- `DELETE /api/construction-projects/:id/contractor-invites/:inviteId` (Admin only — revoke)
- `POST /api/contractor/auth/accept-invite/:token`
- `GET  /api/contractor/projects` (contractor JWT required — return assigned projects)

---

### PB-F: Frontend — Contractor auth pages

**New files:**
- `pmo-frontend/pages/contractor/register.vue` — registration form (fullName, companyName, email, password, confirmPassword, phone, position)
- `pmo-frontend/pages/contractor/login.vue` — login form (email, password)
- `pmo-frontend/pages/contractor/accept-invite.vue` — token acceptance page (reads `?token=` query param)
- `pmo-frontend/layouts/contractor.vue` — minimal layout (no institutional nav, contractor branding)
- `pmo-frontend/stores/contractorAuth.ts` — Pinia store for contractor JWT + session

`definePageMeta({ layout: 'contractor' })` on all `/contractor/` pages.

---

### PB-G: Frontend — Contractor right panel in `CiPersonnelAccessCard.vue`

Replace Phase PA placeholder with live invite panel:
- `GET /api/construction-projects/:id/contractor-invites` → show table of invite tokens (targetEmail, status chip, expiry, [Copy Link] / [Revoke])
- [Generate Invite] button → POST → copy invite URL to clipboard (`/contractor/accept-invite?token=<hex>`)
- Below invite table: list of accepted contractors from `ProjectContractorAssignment` (name, company, role, status)
- [Remove] button (Admin only) → soft-delete assignment

## Implementation Priority Table (PA–PE)

| Order | Phase | Complexity | Risk | Backend? |
|-------|-------|-----------|------|---------|
| 1 | PA-A/B/C/D | Small — entity extension + migration + DTO | Low | ✅ |
| 2 | PA-E/F | Small — composable + adapter update | Low | ❌ |
| 3 | PA-G/H | Medium — new component + 3-page wiring | Medium | ❌ |
| 4 | PB-A/B/C/D | Medium — 3 entities + migration | Low-Med | ✅ |
| 5 | PB-E | Medium — new backend module (auth+invite) | Medium | ✅ |
| 6 | PB-F | Medium — 4 new frontend pages + layout + store | Medium | ❌ |
| 7 | PB-G | Small — replace placeholder with live invite panel | Low | ❌ |
| 8 | PC | Small — sync verification | None | ❌ |
| 9 | PE | Trivial — verification + closure | None | ❌ |

**Execution order:** PA backend-first (PA-A→D), then PA frontend (PA-E→H). PB backend (PB-A→E) then PB frontend (PB-F→G). PC and PE sequential at end.

# COI PA VERIFICATION + PRE-PB FIXES — Phase PV

**Research Reference:** §2.217 (A–H)
**Plan Date:** 2026-05-22
**Branch:** pmo-coi
**Status:** ⬜ PHASE 2 COMPLETE — Awaiting RUN_ACE Phase 3 authorization

---

## Governance Directives (Phase PV)

| ID | Directive |
|----|-----------|
| PV-D1 | `POST /api/auth/register` sets new users to `status: 'PENDING'` — admin must activate. Auto-activation is prohibited (security boundary). |
| PV-D2 | Registration page uses `layout: 'public'` — NO institutional nav, NO auth middleware. |
| PV-D3 | Activity log READ expansion applies to entity-scoped endpoint only — the admin-only list endpoint (`GET /api/activity-logs`) stays restricted to `SuperAdmin`, `Admin`, `Auditor`. |
| PV-D4 | `permissions` JSONB field is schema-less — no migration needed for expanded permission fields (§2.217-G). Existing PA migration covers the column addition. |
| PV-D5 | Save button consolidation: the unified footer renders a single `type="submit"` button; per-tab save buttons are removed to prevent double-submit confusion. |
| PV-D6 | Batch add dialog in CiPersonnelAccessCard is ADDITIVE — the single-user quick-add row remains for fast one-off assignments. |

---

## Phase PV-A — CRITICAL BUG: Assignment Early Return Fix

**Research:** §2.217-A
**File:** `pmo-backend/src/construction-projects/construction-projects.service.ts`
**Risk:** Low — surgical 4-line insertion before existing early return

**Location:** `update()` method, lines ~766–768. Find:
```typescript
if (fields.length === 0 && !requiresStatusReset) {
  return this.findOne(id);
}
```

**Replace with:**
```typescript
if (fields.length === 0 && !requiresStatusReset) {
  // PV-A: process assignments even when no other project fields changed
  if (dto.assignments !== undefined) {
    await this.updateRecordAssignmentsWithMetadata(id, dto.assignments || []);
  } else if (dto.assigned_user_ids !== undefined) {
    await this.updateRecordAssignments(id, dto.assigned_user_ids || []);
  }
  return this.findOne(id);
}
```

This fix ensures `CiPersonnelAccessCard.saveAssignments()` (which sends only `{ assignments: [...] }`) correctly persists changes.

---

## Phase PV-B — currentAssignedUsers IIFE Cleanup

**Research:** §2.217-B
**File:** `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/edit-[id].vue` — `loadProject()` hydration block
**Risk:** Trivial — readability fix only

Find and remove the IIFE side-effect line:
```typescript
...(() => { currentAssignedUsers.value = (p as any).assigned_users || []; return {} })(),
```

Add a standalone statement **after** the `form.value = { ... }` block closes:
```typescript
currentAssignedUsers.value = (p as any).assigned_users || []
```

---

## Phase PV-C — Unified Save + Navigation Footer (edit-[id].vue + new.vue)

**Research:** §2.217-D
**Files:** `edit-[id].vue`, `new.vue`
**Risk:** Medium — removes 7+ per-tab save buttons; single footer is the only save path

### PV-C-1: edit-[id].vue — Remove per-tab save buttons

Find all occurrences of the per-tab save block pattern inside `<v-window-item>` tags:
```html
<div class="d-flex ga-3 justify-end mt-4">
  <v-btn variant="outlined" :disabled="submitting" @click="goBack">Cancel</v-btn>
  <v-btn type="submit" color="primary" :loading="submitting" :disabled="submitting" prepend-icon="mdi-content-save">Save Changes</v-btn>
</div>
```
and the variant without Cancel:
```html
<div class="d-flex justify-end mt-4">
  <v-btn type="submit" color="primary" :loading="submitting" :disabled="submitting" prepend-icon="mdi-content-save">Save Changes</v-btn>
</div>
```

**Remove all** of these from inside window-items. There should be ~7–8 occurrences across the tabs.

### PV-C-2: edit-[id].vue — Replace navigation footer with unified footer

Find the existing tab navigation footer:
```html
<!-- Tab navigation footer (Previous / Next) -->
<div class="d-flex justify-space-between mt-4">
  <v-btn v-if="activeTab !== 'basic'" variant="text" @click="prevTab" :disabled="submitting">
    <v-icon start>mdi-arrow-left</v-icon>
    Previous
  </v-btn>
  <v-spacer />
  <v-btn v-if="activeTab !== 'others'" color="primary" variant="tonal" @click="nextTab" :disabled="submitting">
    Next
    <v-icon end>mdi-arrow-right</v-icon>
  </v-btn>
</div>
```

**Replace with unified footer:**
```html
<!-- PV-C: Unified action footer — [Previous]  [Save Changes] [Next] -->
<div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between mt-4 pt-2" style="border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)">
  <v-btn
    v-if="activeTab !== 'basic'"
    variant="text"
    :disabled="submitting"
    @click="prevTab"
  >
    <v-icon start>mdi-arrow-left</v-icon>
    Previous
  </v-btn>
  <v-spacer />
  <div class="d-flex ga-2">
    <v-btn variant="outlined" :disabled="submitting" @click="goBack">Cancel</v-btn>
    <v-btn
      type="submit"
      color="primary"
      :loading="submitting"
      :disabled="submitting"
      prepend-icon="mdi-content-save"
    >
      Save Changes
    </v-btn>
    <v-btn
      v-if="activeTab !== 'others'"
      color="primary"
      variant="tonal"
      :disabled="submitting"
      @click="nextTab"
    >
      Next
      <v-icon end>mdi-arrow-right</v-icon>
    </v-btn>
  </div>
</div>
```

### PV-C-3: new.vue — Remove per-tab save buttons + unify footer

Same pattern as PV-C-1/2 applied to `new.vue`. The last tab of new.vue has a final submit button — this moves into the unified footer. On the last tab (`others`), the Next button is hidden so Save Changes is the rightmost action.

## Phase PV-D — CSU Registration Page + Backend Endpoint

**Research:** §2.217-E
**Files:** `pmo-backend/src/auth/auth.controller.ts`, `pmo-backend/src/auth/auth.service.ts`, `pmo-frontend/pages/auth/register.vue`
**Risk:** Medium — new endpoint + page; no existing users affected

### PV-D-1: Backend — `POST /api/auth/register`

In `auth.service.ts`, add:
```typescript
async register(dto: RegisterDto): Promise<{ message: string }> {
  const existing = await this.em.findOne(User, { email: dto.email })
  if (existing) throw new ConflictException('Email already registered')
  const hash = await bcrypt.hash(dto.password, 10)
  const user = this.em.create(User, {
    username: dto.email,
    email: dto.email,
    passwordHash: hash,
    firstName: dto.full_name.split(' ')[0],
    lastName: dto.full_name.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') || '',
    status: 'PENDING',   // PV-D1: admin must activate
    metadata: {
      department: dto.department,
      position: dto.position,
      phone: dto.phone,
      registeredAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    },
  })
  await this.em.persistAndFlush(user)
  return { message: 'Registration submitted. An administrator will activate your account.' }
}
```

**RegisterDto** (`pmo-backend/src/auth/dto/register.dto.ts`):
```typescript
import { IsEmail, IsString, IsNotEmpty, MinLength, IsOptional, MaxLength } from 'class-validator'

export class RegisterDto {
  @IsString() @IsNotEmpty() @MaxLength(200) full_name!: string
  @IsEmail() email!: string
  @IsString() @MinLength(8) password!: string
  @IsString() @IsNotEmpty() confirm_password!: string
  @IsOptional() @IsString() department?: string
  @IsOptional() @IsString() position?: string
  @IsOptional() @IsString() phone?: string
}
```

In `auth.controller.ts`, add `@Public()` decorator + `@Post('register')` route.

### PV-D-2: Frontend — `pages/auth/register.vue`

New page: clean enterprise form with Vuetify components.

Fields:
- Full Name (`v-text-field`, required)
- Email (`v-text-field` type=email, required)
- Password (`v-text-field` type=password, minlength 8, with show/hide toggle)
- Confirm Password (must match)
- Department/Office (`v-text-field`, optional)
- Position (`v-text-field`, optional)
- Contact Number (`v-text-field`, optional)

Validation: client-side using `ref` + computed `formValid`. Password strength indicator (simple: length check). Submit calls `POST /api/auth/register` (no auth header needed — `@Public()`). On success: show success message + link to `/auth/login`.

```typescript
definePageMeta({ layout: 'public', middleware: [] })
```

Navigation: `/auth/login` page should have "Don't have an account? Register →" link.

## Phase PV-E — Batch Personnel Add in CiPersonnelAccessCard

**Research:** §2.217-F
**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiPersonnelAccessCard.vue`
**Risk:** Medium — additive dialog; existing single-add remains

### PV-E-1: Add batch add dialog state

Add to script:
```typescript
const batchDialog = ref(false)
const batchSelected = ref<string[]>([])    // selected user IDs
const batchCategory = ref('IMPLEMENTING')
const batchProjectRole = ref('')
const batchSearch = ref('')

const filteredStaff = computed(() =>
  staffUsers.value.filter(u =>
    !draft.value.some(d => d.id === u.id) &&  // exclude already assigned
    (!batchSearch.value ||
      `${u.first_name} ${u.last_name} ${u.email || ''}`
        .toLowerCase()
        .includes(batchSearch.value.toLowerCase()))
  )
)

function openBatchDialog() {
  batchSelected.value = []
  batchCategory.value = 'IMPLEMENTING'
  batchProjectRole.value = ''
  batchSearch.value = ''
  loadStaff()
  batchDialog.value = true
}

function commitBatch() {
  for (const uid of batchSelected.value) {
    if (draft.value.some(d => d.id === uid)) continue
    const staff = staffUsers.value.find(s => s.id === uid)
    if (!staff) continue
    draft.value.push({
      id: staff.id,
      name: `${staff.first_name} ${staff.last_name}`,
      email: staff.email,
      role: null,
      department: staff.campus ?? null,
      phone: null,
      personnelCategory: batchCategory.value,
      projectRole: batchProjectRole.value || null,
      permissions: { canEdit: false, canUpload: false, canApprove: false,
        canAccessFinancials: false, canAccessOthers: false, canAccessPersonnel: false },
      _permOpen: false,
    })
  }
  batchDialog.value = false
}
```

### PV-E-2: Add "Add Multiple" button to card header

Next to existing Add row, add:
```html
<v-btn size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="secondary" prepend-icon="mdi-account-multiple-plus" @click="openBatchDialog">
  Add Multiple
</v-btn>
```

### PV-E-3: Batch dialog template

```html
<v-dialog v-model="batchDialog" max-width="600" scrollable>
  <v-card rounded="lg">
    <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2 py-2 px-4 bg-grey-lighten-4">
      <v-icon icon="mdi-account-multiple-plus" size="small" color="primary" />
      Add Multiple Users
      <v-chip size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="primary">{{ batchSelected.length }} selected</v-chip>
    </v-card-title>
    <v-divider />
    <v-card-text class="pa-3">
      <!-- Search -->
      <v-text-field v-model="batchSearch" placeholder="Search by name or email..." density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify" class="mb-3" />
      <!-- Shared defaults -->
      <v-row dense class="mb-2">
        <v-col cols="6">
          <v-select v-model="batchCategory" :items="PERSONNEL_CATEGORY_OPTIONS" label="Category (all)" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="6">
          <v-text-field v-model="batchProjectRole" label="Project Role (all)" density="compact" variant="outlined" hide-details />
        </v-col>
      </v-row>
      <!-- Selectable list -->
      <v-list density="compact" max-height="300" style="overflow-y: auto">
        <v-list-item
          v-for="user in filteredStaff"
          :key="user.id"
          :value="user.id"
          @click="batchSelected.includes(user.id) ? batchSelected.splice(batchSelected.indexOf(user.id), 1) : batchSelected.push(user.id)"
        >
          <template #prepend>
            <v-checkbox-btn :model-value="batchSelected.includes(user.id)" color="primary" />
            <v-avatar size="28" color="primary" variant="tonal" class="mr-2 text-caption font-weight-bold">
              {{ initials(`${user.first_name} ${user.last_name}`) }}
            </v-avatar>
          </template>
          <v-list-item-title>{{ user.first_name }} {{ user.last_name }}</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle>{{ user.email }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
        </v-list-item>
      </v-list>
    </v-card-text>
    <v-divider />
    <v-card-actions class="pa-3">
      <v-btn variant="text" @click="batchDialog = false">Cancel</v-btn>
      <v-spacer />
      <v-btn color="primary" variant="tonal" :disabled="batchSelected.length === 0" @click="commitBatch">
        Add {{ batchSelected.length }} User{{ batchSelected.length !== 1 ? 's' : '' }}
      </v-btn>
    </v-card-actions>
  </v-card>
</v-dialog>
```

---

## Phase PV-F — Permission Architecture Refactor (3-Section UI)

**Research:** §2.217-G
**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiPersonnelAccessCard.vue`
**Risk:** Low — replaces permission checkboxes with structured 3-section layout; no backend schema migration needed (JSONB)

### PV-F-1: Update `DraftUser.permissions` type

Expand from 6 booleans to full schema:
```typescript
permissions: {
  // Section A — Actions
  canCreate: boolean
  canEdit: boolean
  canDelete: boolean
  canUpload: boolean
  canReview: boolean
  canApprove: boolean
  // Section B — Tab Access
  tabTimeline: boolean
  tabFinancials: boolean
  tabPersonnel: boolean
  tabOthers: boolean
  tabAttachments: boolean
  tabAnalytics: boolean
  tabDocuments: boolean
  tabGallery: boolean
  // Section C — Access Level preset
  accessLevel: 'Viewer' | 'Contributor' | 'Editor' | 'Manager' | 'Admin'
}
```

Default (Viewer): all false + `accessLevel: 'Viewer'`

### PV-F-2: Access Level preset applier

```typescript
const ACCESS_PRESETS: Record<string, Partial<DraftUser['permissions']>> = {
  Viewer:      { canCreate: false, canEdit: false, canDelete: false, canUpload: false, canReview: false, canApprove: false, tabTimeline: true, tabDocuments: true, tabGallery: true, tabAnalytics: false, tabFinancials: false, tabPersonnel: false, tabOthers: false, tabAttachments: true },
  Contributor: { canCreate: true, canEdit: true, canDelete: false, canUpload: true, canReview: false, canApprove: false, tabTimeline: true, tabDocuments: true, tabGallery: true, tabAnalytics: true, tabFinancials: false, tabPersonnel: false, tabOthers: false, tabAttachments: true },
  Editor:      { canCreate: true, canEdit: true, canDelete: true, canUpload: true, canReview: true, canApprove: false, tabTimeline: true, tabDocuments: true, tabGallery: true, tabAnalytics: true, tabFinancials: false, tabPersonnel: false, tabOthers: true, tabAttachments: true },
  Manager:     { canCreate: true, canEdit: true, canDelete: true, canUpload: true, canReview: true, canApprove: true, tabTimeline: true, tabDocuments: true, tabGallery: true, tabAnalytics: true, tabFinancials: true, tabPersonnel: true, tabOthers: true, tabAttachments: true },
  Admin:       { canCreate: true, canEdit: true, canDelete: true, canUpload: true, canReview: true, canApprove: true, tabTimeline: true, tabDocuments: true, tabGallery: true, tabAnalytics: true, tabFinancials: true, tabPersonnel: true, tabOthers: true, tabAttachments: true },
}

function applyPreset(user: DraftUser, level: string) {
  const preset = ACCESS_PRESETS[level]
  if (!preset) return
  Object.assign(user.permissions, preset, { accessLevel: level as any })
}
```

### PV-F-3: Replace flat permission checkboxes with 3-section UI

Inside `v-expand-transition` permission panel, replace the 2-row `v-row dense` with:

```html
<!-- Section C: Access Level Preset (apply first) -->
<div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 mb-1 font-weight-medium">Project Access Level</div>
<div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1 mb-3">
  <v-chip
    v-for="level in ['Viewer','Contributor','Editor','Manager','Admin']"
    :key="level"
    :color="user.permissions.accessLevel === level ? 'primary' : 'grey-lighten-2'"
    :variant="user.permissions.accessLevel === level ? 'flat' : 'outlined'"
    size="small"
    class="cursor-pointer"
    @click="applyPreset(user, level)"
  >{{ level }}</v-chip>
</div>

<!-- Section A: Action Permissions -->
<div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 mb-1 font-weight-medium">Action Permissions</div>
<v-row dense class="mb-2">
  <v-col v-for="p in ['canCreate','canEdit','canDelete','canUpload','canReview','canApprove']" :key="p" cols="6" sm="4">
    <v-checkbox v-model="user.permissions[p]" :label="actionLabel(p)" density="compact" hide-details color="primary" />
  </v-col>
</v-row>

<!-- Section B: Tab Access -->
<div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 mb-1 font-weight-medium">Tab Access</div>
<v-row dense>
  <v-col v-for="tab in ['tabTimeline','tabFinancials','tabPersonnel','tabOthers','tabAttachments','tabAnalytics','tabDocuments','tabGallery']" :key="tab" cols="6" sm="4">
    <v-checkbox v-model="user.permissions[tab]" :label="tabLabel(tab)" density="compact" hide-details color="info" />
  </v-col>
</v-row>
```

With helper functions:
```typescript
function actionLabel(key: string): string {
  const map: Record<string, string> = { canCreate: 'Create', canEdit: 'Edit', canDelete: 'Delete', canUpload: 'Upload', canReview: 'Review', canApprove: 'Approve' }
  return map[key] || key
}
function tabLabel(key: string): string {
  const map: Record<string, string> = { tabTimeline: 'Timeline', tabFinancials: 'Financials', tabPersonnel: 'Personnel', tabOthers: 'Others Tab', tabAttachments: 'Attachments', tabAnalytics: 'Analytics', tabDocuments: 'Documents', tabGallery: 'Gallery' }
  return map[key] || key
}
```

# COI RBAC PROPAGATION FIX + REGISTRATION GOVERNANCE — Phase PQ

**Research Reference:** §2.218 (A–H)
**Plan Date:** 2026-05-22
**Branch:** pmo-coi
**Status:** ⬜ PHASE 2 COMPLETE — Awaiting RUN_ACE Phase 3 authorization

---

## Governance Directives (Phase PQ)

| ID | Directive |
|----|-----------|
| PQ-D1 | `assignmentMetadata` ref, `groupedAssignments` computed, and `PERSONNEL_CATEGORY_OPTIONS` usage in the edit form are DEPRECATED — referenced only for backward read-compat on hydration. The new assignment UI is `CiPersonnelAccessCard`. Remove these from the save payload immediately. |
| PQ-D2 | `POST /api/users/:id/activate` and `POST /api/users/:id/reject-registration` require `@Roles('SuperAdmin', 'Admin')` — no Staff access to approval actions. |
| PQ-D3 | User type stored in `users.metadata.userType` JSONB — no migration needed. |
| PQ-D4 | Registration page duplicates the `.login-container`/`.branding-panel`/`.form-panel` CSS from `login.vue` in a scoped `<style scoped>` block — NOT extracted to a global file. |
| PQ-D5 | Activity log fires on every call to `updateRecordAssignmentsWithMetadata()` and `updateRecordAssignments()` — fire-and-forget per JT-D2. |

---

## Phase PQ-A — Remove Assignments from General Save Payload

**Research:** §2.218-A
**File:** `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/edit-[id].vue` — `submit()` function
**Risk:** Low — only removes stale data from payload; actual assignment management now in CiPersonnelAccessCard

### PQ-A-1: Remove from save payload

In the `submit()` function's payload object, find and remove:
```typescript
assigned_user_ids: form.value.assigned_user_ids.length > 0 ? form.value.assigned_user_ids : undefined,
assignments: form.value.assigned_user_ids.length > 0
  ? form.value.assigned_user_ids.map(uid => { ... })
  : undefined,
```

Replace with nothing — these keys must not appear in the PATCH payload.

### PQ-A-2: Remove assignmentMetadata from form state initializer

In `form.value` initial state, remove:
```typescript
assigned_user_ids: [] as string[],
```
(Keep it only if still used for hydration read-compat in `loadProject` — if so, mark as `// legacy read-only` comment)

### PQ-A-3: Remove assignmentMetadata hydration from tabCompletion

The `tabCompletion.personnel` currently checks `form.value.assigned_user_ids.length`. Replace with:
```typescript
personnel: currentAssignedUsers.value.length > 0,
```

### PQ-A-4: Verification
- Open edit page → modify any project field → click "Save Changes" → project saves normally
- Navigate to Personnel tab → existing assignments are unchanged (not overwritten)
- Open edit page → "Save Personnel" → save permissions → "Save Changes" → permissions still intact on reload

## Phase PQ-B — Extend useCoiAccess RBAC Propagation

**Research:** §2.218-B
**File:** `pmo-frontend/composables/useCoiAccess.ts`
**Risk:** Low — additive permission gates; Admin path unchanged

### PQ-B-1: canEditMilestones

```typescript
// Replace:
const canEditMilestones = computed(() => isAdmin.value)
// With:
const canEditMilestones = computed(() =>
  isAdmin.value || (isOwnerOrAssigned.value && (effectivePermissions.value.canEdit ?? false))
)
```

```typescript
)
```

```typescript
  isAdmin.value || (isOwnerOrAssigned.value && (effectivePermissions.value.tabPersonnel ?? false))
)
```

```typescript
const canUploadDocuments = computed(() =>
  isAdmin.value || (isOwnerOrAssigned.value && (effectivePermissions.value.canUpload ?? false))
)
```

Export `canUploadDocuments` from composable return.

### PQ-B-5: Tab visibility in detail page

For tabs that should be hidden from users without access, apply `v-if` on the `v-tab` element:
- `v-tab value="others"`: add `v-if="canEditAnyTab || effectivePermissions.canAccessOthers"` (Admin always sees it; Staff sees if granted)
- Financial sections inside tabs: gate display with `effectivePermissions.canAccessFinancials`

**Note:** `effectivePermissions` is available on the detail page via `useCoiAccess(project)`. This is already destructured in `detail-[id].vue` — add `effectivePermissions` to the destructure.

## Phase PQ-D — Pending Registration Approval (Backend + Frontend)

**Research:** §2.218-F

### PQ-D-1: Backend — `QueryUserDto` status filter

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/users/users.service.ts` `findAll()` — add condition:
```typescript
if (query.status) {
  conditions.push('u.status = ?');
  params.push(query.status);
}
```

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/users/dto/query-user.dto.ts` (or equivalent):
```typescript
@IsOptional()
@IsString()
status?: string;
```

### PQ-D-2: Backend — Activate endpoint

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/users/users.service.ts` — new method:
```typescript
async activateUser(id: string, adminId: string): Promise<void> {
  const conn = this.em.getConnection();
  await conn.execute(
    `UPDATE users SET status = 'ACTIVE', is_active = true, updated_by = ?, updated_at = NOW()
     WHERE id = ? AND status = 'PENDING'`,
    [adminId, id],
  );
  this.logger.log(`USER_ACTIVATED: id=${id}, by=${adminId}`);
}
```

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/users/users.controller.ts` — new route:
```typescript
@Post(':id/activate')
@Roles('SuperAdmin', 'Admin')
@HttpCode(HttpStatus.OK)
async activate(@Param('id') id: string, @Req() req: any) {
  await this.service.activateUser(id, req.user.sub);
  return { message: 'User activated' };
}
```

### PQ-D-3: Backend — Reject registration endpoint

```typescript
// service:
async rejectRegistration(id: string, adminId: string): Promise<void> {
  const conn = this.em.getConnection();
  await conn.execute(
    `UPDATE users SET status = 'REJECTED', is_active = false, updated_by = ?, updated_at = NOW()
     WHERE id = ? AND status = 'PENDING'`,
    [adminId, id],
  );
  this.logger.log(`REGISTRATION_REJECTED: id=${id}, by=${adminId}`);
}
// controller:
@Post(':id/reject-registration')
@Roles('SuperAdmin', 'Admin')
@HttpCode(HttpStatus.OK)
async rejectRegistration(@Param('id') id: string, @Req() req: any) { ... }
```

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/auth/dto/register.dto.ts` — add:
```typescript
@IsOptional()
@IsString()
user_type?: string;

@IsOptional()
@IsString()
user_type_other?: string;
```

**File:** `pmo-backend/src/auth/auth.service.ts` `register()` — store in metadata:
```typescript
metadata: {
  ...(existing metadata),
  userType: dto.user_type || 'CSU_PERSONNEL',
  userTypeOther: dto.user_type_other,
},
```

### PQ-D-5: Frontend — Pending Approval section in User Management

**File:** `pmo-frontend/pages/users/index.vue`

Add a "Pending Registrations" `<v-chip>` badge on the page header showing pending count. On load, fetch `GET /api/users?status=PENDING&limit=100` and store in `pendingUsers` ref.

Add a collapsible `v-expansion-panel` or a separate tab at the top of the users list:
```html
<v-expansion-panels v-if="pendingUsers.length > 0" class="mb-4">
  <v-expansion-panel>
    <v-expansion-panel-title>
      <v-icon start color="warning">mdi-account-clock</v-icon>
      Pending Registrations
      <v-chip size="x-small" color="warning" variant="tonal" class="ml-2">{{ pendingUsers.length }}</v-chip>
    </v-expansion-panel-title>
    <v-expansion-panel-text>
      <v-list density="compact">
        <v-list-item v-for="user in pendingUsers" :key="user.id">
          <template #prepend>
            <v-avatar size="36" color="warning" variant="tonal">
              {{ initials(user) }}
            </v-avatar>
          </template>
          <v-list-item-title>{{ user.firstName }} {{ user.lastName }}</v-list-item-title>
          <v-list-item-subtitle>{{ user.email }} · {{ user.metadata?.userType }} · {{ formatDate(user.createdAt) }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
          <template #append>
            <div class="d-flex ga-2">
              <v-btn size="x-small" color="success" variant="tonal" @click="approveUser(user.id)">Approve</v-btn>
              <v-btn size="x-small" color="error" variant="outlined" @click="rejectUser(user.id)">Reject</v-btn>
            </div>
          </template>
        </v-list-item>
      </v-list>
    </v-expansion-panel-text>
  </v-expansion-panel>
</v-expansion-panels>
```

Functions:
```typescript
async function approveUser(id: string) {
  await api.post(`/api/users/${id}/activate`, {})
  await loadPendingUsers()
  toast.success('User activated')
}
async function rejectUser(id: string) {
  await api.post(`/api/users/${id}/reject-registration`, {})
  await loadPendingUsers()
  toast.success('Registration rejected')
}
```
