## Phase BBB — Attachment Hub Enterprise Refactor v2

**Status:** ⬜ PLAN READY — Awaiting Phase 3 authorization
**Research:** `research.md §2.250` (A–I)
**Branch:** `pmo-coi`
**Last Updated:** 2026-05-27

**Scope:** Six targeted refactors to CiAttachmentHub and its children:
- BBB-A: Hub tab restructure — remove standalone ECO tab, rename CPES → "Compliance Repository"
- BBB-B: New `CiComplianceRepository.vue` — per-item workspace replacing the CPES single card
- BBB-C: Gallery section simplification — thumbnail strip + "Open Gallery" CTA
- BBB-D: CiDocumentChecklist — revert AAA-E grid to collapsible v-expansion-panels
- BBB-E: Modal size reduction — remove fullscreen from CiRepositoryModal + CiGalleryModal
- BBB-F: Supporting Docs 4th card — ECO & PMO Forms repository

**Execution order:** BBB-E → BBB-D → BBB-A → BBB-F → BBB-C → BBB-B (modals first so accordion + hub changes land on stable base)

---

### Governance Directives (Phase BBB)

| ID | Directive |
|----|-----------|
| BBB-D1 | `CiAttachmentHub.vue` remains the ONLY place attachment sections are rendered (Directive ZY-D1). |
| BBB-D2 | ECO_FORMS group code in database is IMMUTABLE — do not rename, delete, or re-seed. Only the hub tab is removed; ECO forms move to Supporting Docs card via existing `codesForGroup('ECO_FORMS')` computed. |
| BBB-D3 | `CiComplianceRepository.vue` fetches the existing document checklist endpoint (`/api/construction-projects/:id/document-checklist`) — no new backend endpoints. It filters client-side to CPES_DOCS group. |
| BBB-D4 | `api.del()` not `api.delete()` — JB-D3 preserved. |
| BBB-D5 | Frontend type interfaces remain in `pmo-frontend/utils/adapters.ts` only — JB-D3 preserved. |
| BBB-D6 | No backend changes in Phase BBB. All changes are frontend-only. |
| BBB-D7 | Gallery staging queue (`queue.images`) must remain functional in `new.vue` staging mode even after gallery section simplification. |

---

### BBB-E: Modal Size Reduction

**Files:** `CiRepositoryModal.vue`, `CiGalleryModal.vue`

**CiRepositoryModal.vue — change:**
```diff
- <v-dialog v-model="open" fullscreen scrollable transition="dialog-bottom-transition">
+ <v-dialog v-model="open" max-width="1100" scrollable>
    <v-card>
+     <v-card-text style="max-height:82vh;overflow-y:auto">
```
Remove outer `<v-card-text>` wrapper if it already wraps the doc list. The toolbar stays. `v-card-text` inside gets an explicit max-height so it scrolls internally. Keep all existing content unchanged.

**CiGalleryModal.vue — change:**
```diff
- <v-dialog v-model="open" fullscreen transition="dialog-bottom-transition" scrollable>
+ <v-dialog v-model="open" max-width="1200" scrollable>
    <v-card>
+     <v-card-text style="max-height:82vh;overflow-y:auto">
```
Same pattern — toolbar stays, content area scrolls.

**Verification:** BBB-E-V1: Opening either modal no longer covers the entire viewport; it appears centered with visible background overlay.

### BBB-D: CiDocumentChecklist — Accordion Restoration

**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiDocumentChecklist.vue`

Replace the AAA-E `<v-row dense>` grid block (lines 338–480 in current file, from `<!-- AAA-E: Responsive grid dashboard -->` through the closing `</v-row>`) with `v-expansion-panels` that collapse by default.

**Replacement template block:**
```html
<!-- BBB-D: Collapsible accordion — header shows group progress, items expand on click -->
<v-expansion-panels v-else variant="accordion" multiple class="mb-4">
  <v-expansion-panel v-for="g in groupedItems" :key="g.groupCode">
    <v-expansion-panel-title>
      <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 w-100">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-folder-outline" size="small" />
        <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ g.groupLabel }}</span>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-chip
          size="x-small" variant="tonal"
          :color="g.submittedCount === g.items.length ? 'success' : (g.missingCount > 0 ? 'warning' : 'info')"
          class="mr-2"
        >
          {{ g.submittedCount }}/{{ g.items.length }}
        </v-chip>
        <v-progress-linear
          :model-value="g.items.length ? (g.submittedCount / g.items.length) * 100 : 0"
          :color="g.submittedCount === g.items.length ? 'success' : 'primary'"
          height="4"
          rounded
          style="max-width:80px"
        />
      </div>
    </v-expansion-panel-title>
    <v-expansion-panel-text>
      <v-list density="compact" class="pa-0">
        <v-list-item v-for="item in g.items" :key="item.id" lines="two" class="px-0 py-1">
          <!-- identical item slot content as before -->
          ...
        </v-list-item>
      </v-list>
      <!-- KV-D3 group remarks -->
      ...
    </v-expansion-panel-text>
  </v-expansion-panel>
</v-expansion-panels>
```

The item slot content (`template #prepend`, `v-list-item-title`, `v-list-item-subtitle`, `template #append`) is copied verbatim from the existing grid card `<v-list-item>` block — no logic changes.

**Verification:** BBB-D-V1: Checklist renders as collapsed accordion by default. BBB-D-V2: Each panel header shows group label + submitted/total chip + mini progress bar. BBB-D-V3: Expanding a panel reveals the item list with status chips, remarks, and action buttons.

### BBB-F: Supporting Documents 4th ECO Card

**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiAttachmentHub.vue`

**Step F-1: Add ecoStats computed** (after existing `cpesStats` computed, ~line 179):
```typescript
const ecoStats = computed(() => repoStats(codesForGroup('ECO_FORMS')))
```
Note: `codesForGroup('ECO_FORMS')` already works — `ecoFormTypes` computed already exists; `codesForGroup` uses `docTypeGroups` which includes ECO_FORMS.

Change Supporting Docs grid cols and add 4th card:
```diff
  <!-- ===== Section 4: Supporting Documents ===== -->
  <v-window-item value="supporting">
    <v-row dense>
-     <v-col cols="12" md="4">
+     <v-col cols="12" sm="6" lg="3">
        <CiRepositoryCard title="Orders" ...>
-     <v-col cols="12" md="4">
+     <v-col cols="12" sm="6" lg="3">
        <CiRepositoryCard title="Reports & Monitoring" ...>
-     <v-col cols="12" md="4">
+     <v-col cols="12" sm="6" lg="3">
        <CiRepositoryCard title="Certifications" ...>
+     <v-col cols="12" sm="6" lg="3">
+       <CiRepositoryCard
+         title="ECO & PMO Forms" icon="mdi-form-select" color="purple"
+         :doc-count="ecoStats.docCount"
+         :completed-count="ecoStats.completedCount"
+         :total-types="ecoStats.totalTypes"
+         :latest-upload="ecoStats.latestUpload"
+         :can-upload="canUpload"
+         @open="openRepo('ECO & PMO Forms', 'mdi-form-select', 'purple', codesForGroup('ECO_FORMS'))"
+         @upload="openRepo('ECO & PMO Forms', 'mdi-form-select', 'purple', codesForGroup('ECO_FORMS'), true)"
+       />
+     </v-col>
    </v-row>
  </v-window-item>
```

### BBB-C: Gallery Section Simplification

**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiAttachmentHub.vue`

**Step C-1: Remove dead state** (all of the following refs and functions are no longer needed in the hub — CiGalleryModal owns its own upload state):
- Remove refs: `profileImageFile`, `profileImageCaption`, `profileImageTakenDate`, `galleryImageFile`, `galleryImageCaption`, `galleryImageCategory`, `galleryImageTakenDate`, `galleryActiveTab`
- Remove computed: `profileGallery`, `generalGallery`
- Remove functions: `uploadProfileImage`, `uploadGalleryImage`
- Keep: `galleryModalOpen`, `gallery`, `persistGallery`, `deleteGalleryItem`, `fetchGallery`

**Step C-2: Replace Gallery window-item template**

Old Section 2 (`<v-window-item value="gallery">`) is ~70 lines with tabs + forms. Replace with:
```html
<!-- ===== Section 2: Gallery ===== -->
<v-window-item value="gallery">
  <v-card variant="outlined">
    <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2 text-body-1">
      <v-icon icon="mdi-image-multiple" size="small" />
      Gallery
      <v-chip v-if="gallery.length" size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="grey" class="ml-1">
        {{ gallery.length }}
      </v-chip>
      <v-spacer />
      <v-btn variant="tonal" color="primary" size="small" prepend-icon="mdi-folder-open-outline"
        @click="galleryModalOpen = true">
        Open Gallery
      </v-btn>
    </v-card-title>
    <v-divider />
    <v-card-text>
      <!-- Thumbnail strip preview (first 8 images) -->
      <div v-if="gallery.length" class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mb-3">
        <v-img
          v-for="img in gallery.slice(0, 8)" :key="img.id"
          :src="img.imageUrl"
          width="100" height="72" cover class="rounded cursor-pointer"
          style="flex: 0 0 auto"
          @click="galleryModalOpen = true"
        />
        <div
          v-if="gallery.length > 8"
          class="d-flex align-center justify-center rounded bg-surface-variant cursor-pointer"
          style="width:100px;height:72px;flex:0 0 auto"
          @click="galleryModalOpen = true"
        >
          <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">+{{ gallery.length - 8 }} more</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p v-else class="text-grey text-body-2 mb-3">No gallery images yet. Open the gallery to upload.</p>

      <!-- Staging queue preview (new.vue mode) -->
      <template v-if="isStaging && queue.images.length">
        <v-divider class="my-3" />
        <div class="text-overline text-medium-emphasis mb-1">STAGED IMAGES ({{ queue.images.length }})</div>
        <v-list density="compact">
          <v-list-item v-for="(im, i) in queue.images" :key="`stg-img-${i}`">
            <template #prepend><v-icon icon="mdi-image-outline" color="orange" /></template>
            <v-list-item-title>{{ im.file.name }}</v-list-item-title>
            <v-list-item-subtitle>{{ im.category }}<span v-if="im.caption"> — {{ im.caption }}</span></v-list-item-subtitle>
            <template #append><v-btn icon="mdi-close" size="small" variant="text" color="error" @click="queue.images.splice(i, 1); emitQueue()" /></template>
          </v-list-item>
        </v-list>
      </template>

      <!-- Upload CTA for staging mode -->
      <v-alert v-if="isStaging && canUpload" type="info" variant="tonal" density="compact" class="mt-2">
        Images will be uploaded after the project is created.
        <v-btn variant="text" size="small" class="ml-2" @click="galleryModalOpen = true">Add Images</v-btn>
      </v-alert>
    </v-card-text>
  </v-card>
</v-window-item>
```

**Verification:** BBB-C-V1: Gallery section shows compact thumbnail strip (up to 8 images). BBB-C-V2: "Open Gallery" button opens CiGalleryModal with full gallery + upload. BBB-C-V3: Staging mode shows staged image list + "Add Images" CTA. BBB-C-V4: No console errors about removed computed properties.

---

### BBB-B: CiComplianceRepository.vue (New Component)

**File (new):** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiComplianceRepository.vue`

This component replaces the single CiRepositoryCard in the CPES window-item. It fetches the project checklist, filters to CPES_DOCS items, and renders a per-item workspace.

**Props:**
```typescript
interface Props {
  projectId: string
  canEdit?: boolean       // upload + status edit
  canEditRemarks?: boolean
  documents?: HubDoc[]    // pass-through from hub for linked-file resolution
}
```

**Key logic:**
1. `fetchChecklist()` — fetches `/api/construction-projects/:id/document-checklist` (same endpoint as CiDocumentChecklist)
2. `cpesItems = computed(() => items.value.filter(i => i.documentType?.groupCode === 'CPES_DOCS'))`
3. Per-item state: `uploadingItem = reactive<Record<string, boolean>>({})`
4. `submitFile(item, file)` — uploads via `/api/construction-projects/:id/document-checklist/:itemId/submissions` FormData
5. `patchStatus(item, status)` — PATCH `/api/construction-projects/:id/document-checklist/:itemId` `{ submission_status }`
6. `patchRemarks(item, remarks)` — PATCH same endpoint `{ remarks }` (on textarea blur)
7. `openHistory(item)` — sets historyDrawer + fetches `/submissions`
8. Progress summary: `approvedCount = computed(() => cpesItems.value.filter(i => i.submissionStatus === 'APPROVED').length)`

**Template structure:**
```html
<template>
  <div>
    <!-- Summary bar -->
    <v-card variant="tonal" color="deep-purple" class="mb-4">
      <v-card-text class="d-flex align-center ga-4 py-2">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-certificate-outline" />
        <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">Compliance Repository — CPES Documentary Requirements</span>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" color="white">{{ approvedCount }} / {{ cpesItems.length }} approved</v-chip>
        <v-progress-linear ... max-width="120px" />
      </v-card-text>
    </v-card>

    <!-- Per-item list -->
    <v-card v-for="item in cpesItems" :key="item.id" variant="outlined" class="mb-2">
      <v-card-text class="py-2">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 flex-wrap">
          <v-icon :icon="statusIcon(item.submissionStatus)" :color="statusColor(item.submissionStatus)" size="small" />
          <span class="text-body-2">{{ item.documentType?.typeLabel }}</span>
          <v-icon v-if="item.documentType?.isRequired" icon="mdi-asterisk" size="x-small" color="error" />
          <v-chip :color="statusColor(item.submissionStatus)" size="x-small" variant="tonal">
            {{ statusLabel(item.submissionStatus) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-spacer />
          <!-- Template download chip if templateUrl -->
          <v-btn v-if="item.documentType?.templateUrl" size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="indigo"
            prepend-icon="mdi-download" :href="item.documentType.templateUrl" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            Blank Form
          </v-btn>
          <!-- Linked file chip -->
          <v-chip v-if="linkedDoc(item)" size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="primary"
            prepend-icon="mdi-file-check" :href="linkedDoc(item)!.filePath" target="_blank" tag="a">
            {{ linkedDoc(item)!.fileName }}
          </v-chip>
          <!-- Upload button -->
          <v-btn v-if="canEdit" size="x-small" variant="tonal"
            :color="item.linkedDocumentId ? 'warning' : 'primary'"
            :icon="item.linkedDocumentId ? 'mdi-refresh' : 'mdi-upload'"
            :loading="uploadingItem[item.id]"
            @click="openUpload(item)"
          />
          <!-- History button -->
          <v-btn size="x-small" variant="text" icon="mdi-history" color="grey" @click="openHistory(item)" />
        </div>
        <!-- Remarks row -->
        <div v-if="canEditRemarks" class="mt-2">
          <v-textarea :model-value="item.remarks ?? ''" placeholder="Evaluator remarks…"
            rows="1" auto-grow variant="outlined" density="compact" hide-details
            @blur="patchRemarks(item, ($event.target as HTMLTextAreaElement).value)" />
        </div>
        <p v-else-if="item.remarks" class="text-caption text-grey mt-1">
          <v-icon size="x-small">mdi-comment-text-outline</v-icon> {{ item.remarks }}
        </p>
      </v-card-text>
    </v-card>

    <!-- Upload dialog (single file, emits submission) -->
    <v-dialog v-model="uploadDialog" max-width="460">
      <v-card>
        <v-card-title class="text-body-1">Submit Document</v-card-title>
        <v-divider />
        <v-card-text>
          <p v-if="uploadTarget" class="text-caption text-grey mb-3">{{ uploadTarget.documentType?.typeLabel }}</p>
          <v-file-input v-model="uploadFile" label="File (≤ 20 MB)" show-size variant="outlined" density="comfortable" hide-details class="mb-3" />
          <v-textarea v-model="uploadNotes" label="Notes (optional)" rows="2" variant="outlined" density="comfortable" hide-details />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn variant="text" @click="uploadDialog = false">Cancel</v-btn>
          <v-btn color="primary" :loading="submittingUpload" :disabled="!uploadFile" @click="saveUpload">Submit</v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>

    <!-- Submission history drawer -->
    <v-navigation-drawer v-model="historyDrawer" location="right" width="380" temporary>
      ...same pattern as CiDocumentChecklist historyDrawer...
    </v-navigation-drawer>
  </div>
</template>
```

**Integration in CiAttachmentHub.vue — CPES window-item (BBB-B-2):**
Replace the `<v-row dense>` with single CiRepositoryCard + alert inside `<v-window-item value="cpes">` with:
```html
<v-window-item v-if="cpesTypes.length" value="cpes">
  <CiComplianceRepository
    :project-id="projectId"
    :can-edit="canUpload"
    :can-edit-remarks="canEditRemarks"
    :documents="documents"
  />
</v-window-item>
```

No new backend routes. The component reuses the existing checklist + submissions endpoints.

**Verification:**
- BBB-B-V1: "Compliance Repository" tab renders per-item list for all CPES_DOCS types
- BBB-B-V2: Upload button opens dialog; submitting a file records a submission and refreshes the item
- BBB-B-V3: Status chip updates after submission
- BBB-B-V4: Remarks textarea saves on blur (canEditRemarks mode only)
- BBB-B-V5: History button opens drawer with submission history
- BBB-B-V6: Read-only mode (canEdit=false) hides upload button, shows status + remarks display

## Phase CCC — Attachment Ecosystem Enterprise Hardening

**Status:** ⬜ PLAN READY — Awaiting Phase 3 authorization
**Research:** `research.md §2.251` (A–I), decisions D-CCC-1 … D-CCC-7
**Branch:** `pmo-coi` · **Last Updated:** 2026-05-27

**Scope (net-new only — overlapping items already shipped in AAA/BBB per §2.251-A):**
- CCC-A: Download lifecycle — authenticated streaming endpoint + filename/MIME preservation + DOWNLOAD audit (backend + frontend)
- CCC-B: Checklist → repository navigation (click checklist item → jump to its repository tab/modal)
- CCC-C: Compliance Repository two-column grid + hide Cover Sheet (Annex-8)
- CCC-D: Supporting Docs category labels (Certifications & Other Documents; Other Attachments = Miscellaneous)
- CCC-E: Filter / toolbar icon sizing standardization across all repository components

**Execution order:** CCC-A (backend first) → CCC-C → CCC-D → CCC-E → CCC-B (navigation last; depends on stable tabs)

---

### Governance Directives (Phase CCC)

| ID | Directive |
|----|-----------|
| CCC-D1 | `CiAttachmentHub.vue` remains the ONLY attachment renderer (ZY-D1). All 3 pages stay identical via mode prop. |
| CCC-D2 | Backend route base `/api/construction-projects` IMMUTABLE (JB-D1). New download route is an additive sub-path; public controller MUST NOT gain it. |
| CCC-D3 | No destructive taxonomy migrations. Annex-8 (`CPES_COVER_SHEET`) is hidden client-side, NOT deleted from DB. |
| CCC-D4 | `api.del()` not `api.delete()` (JB-D3). Frontend interfaces stay in components/adapters only. |
| CCC-D5 | Download endpoint mirrors READ roles (Admin/Staff/Viewer/Auditor); fires `ActivityAction.DOWNLOAD`. Hybrid ORM preserved — no new `DatabaseService`. |
| CCC-D6 | External-link documents (`mimeType = application/x-google-drive-link`) keep raw href; download endpoint is for stored files only. |
| CCC-D7 | No new npm dependencies. Use Nest `StreamableFile` + `@nestjs/common` only. |

---

### CCC-A: Download Lifecycle + Audit

**Backend — `construction-projects.controller.ts`** (add route after `removeDocument`):
```typescript
@Get(':id/documents/:docId/download')
@Roles('Admin', 'Staff', 'Viewer', 'Auditor')
@ApiOperation({ summary: 'Stream a stored document with original filename + DOWNLOAD audit' })
downloadDocument(
  @Param('id', ParseUUIDPipe) id: string,
  @Param('docId', ParseUUIDPipe) docId: string,
  @CurrentUser() user: JwtPayload,
  @Res({ passthrough: true }) res: Response,
): Promise<StreamableFile> {
  return this.service.streamDocument(id, docId, user, res);
}
```

**Backend — `construction-projects.service.ts`** (`streamDocument`):
```typescript
async streamDocument(projectId: string, docId: string, user: JwtPayload, res: Response): Promise<StreamableFile> {
  const doc = await this.documentRepo.findOne({ id: docId, documentableType: 'CONSTRUCTION_PROJECT', documentableId: projectId });
  if (!doc) throw new NotFoundException(`Document ${docId} not found`);
  if (doc.mimeType === 'application/x-google-drive-link') throw new BadRequestException('External links are not downloadable');
  const abs = this.uploadsService.getFilePath(doc.filePath);
  if (!this.uploadsService.fileExists(doc.filePath)) throw new NotFoundException('Physical file missing');
  res.set({
    'Content-Type': doc.mimeType || 'application/octet-stream',
    'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="${encodeURIComponent(doc.fileName)}"`,
  });
  this.fireLog(user, ActivityAction.DOWNLOAD, projectId, { section: 'DOCUMENT', docId, fileName: doc.fileName });
  return new StreamableFile(fs.createReadStream(abs));
}
```
Imports: `StreamableFile` from `@nestjs/common`; `Response` from `express`; `createReadStream` from `fs`; `@Res` decorator.

**Frontend** — add `download(endpoint, fileName)` helper to `useApi.ts` (fetch blob with auth header → `URL.createObjectURL` → anchor click → revoke). Replace stored-file download controls in `CiRepositoryModal`, `CiComplianceRepository`, `CiGalleryModal` history, and hub doc lists: instead of `:href="doc.filePath"`, call `api.download('/api/construction-projects/'+projectId+'/documents/'+doc.id+'/download', doc.fileName)`. Keep raw href for `isLink(doc)` items.

**Verification:** CCC-A-V1 download streams original filename; V2 MIME correct; V3 `ActivityAction.DOWNLOAD` row appears in audit log; V4 external links still open via raw href; V5 missing physical file → 404 not 500.

**`CiAttachmentHub.vue`:** handle `@navigate`:
```typescript
function onChecklistNavigate(p: { groupCode?: string; typeCode?: string }) {
  const map: Record<string,string> = { SD_ORDERS:'supporting', SD_REPORTS:'supporting', SD_CERTS:'supporting', ECO_FORMS:'supporting', CPES_DOCS:'cpes' }
  const target = map[p.groupCode ?? ''] ?? ((keyCodes as string[]).includes(p.typeCode ?? '') ? 'key' : 'other')
  activeSection.value = target
  // For repository-backed groups, open the matching modal filtered to the type
  if (target === 'supporting' && p.typeCode) openRepo(typeCodeToLabel[p.typeCode] ?? 'Supporting Documents', 'mdi-folder-multiple-outline', 'primary', [p.typeCode])
}
```
Wire `<CiDocumentChecklist @navigate="onChecklistNavigate" />` in both checklist mount points.

**Verification:** CCC-B-V1 clicking an item's nav button switches to the correct hub tab; CCC-B-V2 for supporting/CPES it opens/positions the right repository; CCC-B-V3 key-doc items jump to Key Documents tab.

## Phase DDD — Landing Dashboard + Detail Densification + Toolbar Fix + SD Template Library

**Status:** ⬜ PLAN READY — Awaiting Phase 3 authorization
**Research:** `research.md §2.252` (A–G), decisions D-DDD-1 … D-DDD-4
**Branch:** `pmo-coi` · **Last Updated:** 2026-05-27

**Scope (net-new only — modal/download/icon work already shipped in AAA-H/BBB-E/CCC):**
- DDD-A: Supporting-Documents template library — seed real `.docx` blank forms onto `template_url` for `SD_ECO_001–019`
- DDD-B: Attachment filter-toolbar overflow fix (responsive grid; no label collision / clipped date fields)
- DDD-C: COI landing-page dashboard enrichment (budget, publication breakdown, delayed projects, role-gated recent activity) using existing endpoints
- DDD-D: Project Details Overview densification (grouped responsive card grid; presentation-only)

**Execution order:** DDD-A (data/seed first — unblocks download→reupload) → DDD-B (toolbar) → DDD-D (detail overview) → DDD-C (landing)

---

### Governance Directives (Phase DDD)

| ID | Directive |
|----|-----------|
| DDD-D1 | Single attachment renderer `CiAttachmentHub` preserved (ZY-D1); detail/new/edit stay synchronized via mode prop + adapters. |
| DDD-D2 | No new backend routes. Template seeding is DATA-ONLY via an idempotent script (`scripts/seed-sd-templates.ts`) — NOT a MikroORM migration (migrations must not copy files). |
| DDD-D3 | Taxonomy (`construction_document_types`) rows are NOT altered structurally; only `template_url` is populated for `SD_ECO_001–019`. No group/code/label changes. |
| DDD-D4 | Frontend interfaces remain in `utils/adapters.ts`; `api.del()` not `api.delete()`. |
| DDD-D5 | Recent-activity landing widget MUST role-gate to SuperAdmin/Admin/Auditor (the `GET /api/activity-logs` list endpoint's roles). |
| DDD-D6 | Landing/detail enrichment uses ONLY existing endpoints (`analytics/summary`, `analytics/financial-summary`, `activity-logs`). No speculative analytics endpoints (YAGNI). |
| DDD-D7 | Detail Overview + edit/new forms: presentation-only changes; no field renames, no adapter changes, no logic moves. |

---

### DDD-A: SD Template Library Seed

**New file `pmo-backend/scripts/seed-sd-templates.ts`** (run: `npx ts-node scripts/seed-sd-templates.ts`):
1. Resolve source root `docs/references/SHAREABLE SUPPORT DOCUMENTS-20260526T231911Z-3-001/`.
2. Mapping table (code → relative file path), per §2.252-B (19 entries). Prefer `[SHAREABLE]` files; for 005–007 use the `[DRAFT]` files; LUDIP mapped by name.
3. Ensure dest dir `<UPLOAD_DIR>/coi-templates/` exists (UPLOAD_DIR from env, default `./uploads`).
4. For each entry: copy source → `coi-templates/SD_ECO_0NN.docx` (overwrite); then SQL `UPDATE construction_document_types SET template_url = '/uploads/coi-templates/SD_ECO_0NN.docx' WHERE type_code = $code`.
5. Connect via the same pg config the app uses (read `DATABASE_URL`/env). Log per-row result; idempotent (safe re-run).

Skeleton:
```typescript
import { Client } from 'pg'
import * as fs from 'fs'
import * as path from 'path'

const SRC = path.resolve(__dirname, '../../docs/references/SHAREABLE SUPPORT DOCUMENTS-20260526T231911Z-3-001')
const UPLOAD_DIR = process.env.UPLOAD_DIR || path.resolve(__dirname, '../uploads')
const DEST = path.join(UPLOAD_DIR, 'coi-templates')

const MAP: Array<{ code: string; file: string }> = [
  { code: 'SD_ECO_001', file: 'ORDERS/[SHAREABLE] SD-ECO-ECO-001_Variation Order.docx' },
  // … 002–004 SHAREABLE, 005–007 [DRAFT], 008–015 REPORTS, 016–018 CERTS, 019 Mandatory Certification - LUDIP.docx
]

async function main() {
  fs.mkdirSync(DEST, { recursive: true })
  const client = new Client({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL })
  await client.connect()
  for (const { code, file } of MAP) {
    const src = path.join(SRC, file)
    if (!fs.existsSync(src)) { console.warn(`MISSING ${code}: ${file}`); continue }
    const dest = path.join(DEST, `${code}.docx`)
    fs.copyFileSync(src, dest)
    await client.query(
      `UPDATE construction_document_types SET template_url = $1 WHERE type_code = $2`,
      [`/uploads/coi-templates/${code}.docx`, code],
    )
    console.log(`SEEDED ${code}`)
  }
  await client.end()
}
main().catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1) })
```

**Frontend:** no change required — `CiRepositoryModal` already shows the "Blank forms:" download row from `templateUrl`. CCC-A's authenticated download applies to *uploaded* docs; templates remain static `/uploads/coi-templates/*` links (public-ish static assets, acceptable for blank forms). Optionally surface a per-type "Download blank form" button in each Supporting-Docs repository card subtitle (deferred unless operator requests).

**Verification:** DDD-A-V1 after seed, `GET document-types/grouped` returns `templateUrl` populated for SD_ECO_001–019; DDD-A-V2 opening Orders/Reports/Certifications repository modal shows "Blank forms" download buttons; DDD-A-V3 downloaded `.docx` opens in Word with the correct form; DDD-A-V4 re-running the script does not duplicate or error.

---

### DDD-B: Filter Toolbar Overflow Fix

**`CiAttachmentHub.vue`** — replace the global filter `d-flex flex-wrap` row with a responsive `v-row dense`:
```html
<v-row dense class="mb-3 align-center">
  <v-col cols="12" sm="6" md="5">
    <v-text-field v-model="filter.searchText.value" prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify"
      placeholder="Search attachments…" variant="outlined" density="compact"
      hide-details single-line clearable clear-icon="mdi-close-circle-outline" />
  </v-col>
  <v-col cols="6" sm="3" md="3">
    <v-text-field v-model="filter.filterDateFrom.value" type="date" label="From"
      variant="outlined" density="compact" hide-details style="min-width:140px" />
  </v-col>
  <v-col cols="6" sm="3" md="3">
    <v-text-field v-model="filter.filterDateTo.value" type="date" label="To"
      variant="outlined" density="compact" hide-details style="min-width:140px" />
  </v-col>
  <v-col cols="12" md="1" class="d-flex justify-end">
    <v-btn v-if="filter.activeCount.value" variant="text" size="small" prepend-icon="mdi-filter-off" @click="filter.reset()">
      Clear ({{ filter.activeCount.value }})
    </v-btn>
  </v-col>
</v-row>
```

**Verification:** DDD-B-V1 date-field labels never overlap the value at any width; DDD-B-V2 search no longer dominates; DDD-B-V3 toolbar wraps cleanly on mobile (search full row, From/To half each); DDD-B-V4 no clipped/cut-off text.

---

### EEE-E: New `CiSupportingDocsRepository.vue`

**New file:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiSupportingDocsRepository.vue`

**Props:**
```typescript
interface Props {
  projectId: string
  groupCode: string          // SD_ORDERS | SD_REPORTS | SD_CERTS
  groupLabel: string         // e.g. "Orders", "Reports & Monitoring"
  color?: string             // summary bar color (default 'blue')
  icon?: string              // summary bar icon (default 'mdi-folder-multiple-outline')
  canEdit?: boolean
  canEditRemarks?: boolean
}
```

**Logic (identical to CiComplianceRepository, replacing `'CPES_DOCS'` with `groupCode` prop):**

```typescript
const items = ref<ChecklistItem[]>([])
const loading = ref(false)

const groupItems = computed(() =>
  items.value.filter((i) => i.documentType?.groupCode === props.groupCode),
)
const approvedCount = computed(() => groupItems.value.filter((i) => i.submissionStatus === 'APPROVED').length)
const submittedCount = computed(() => groupItems.value.filter((i) => i.submissionStatus !== 'NOT_SUBMITTED').length)

async function fetchChecklist() {
  if (!props.projectId) return
  loading.value = true
  try {
    const res = await api.get<any>(`/api/construction-projects/${props.projectId}/document-checklist`)
    items.value = Array.isArray(res) ? res : (res?.data || [])
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

watch(() => props.projectId, () => { if (props.projectId) fetchChecklist() })
onMounted(() => { if (props.projectId) fetchChecklist() })
defineExpose({ refresh: fetchChecklist })
```

**Upload/submission:** same `POST /api/construction-projects/:id/document-checklist/:itemId/submissions` endpoint.
**History:** same `GET .../submissions` endpoint.
**Download:** same `api.download(...)` helper.
**Blank-form:** `item.documentType?.templateUrl` → `v-btn href` link (same as CiComplianceRepository).

**Template (key differences from CiComplianceRepository):**
- Summary bar: uses `groupLabel` prop + `color` prop + `icon` prop (no hard-coded "CPES Documentary Requirements")
- `v-row dense` 2-column grid same as CPES
- No `EXCLUDED_*_CODES` filter (SD groups have no exclusions)
- Card content: identical to CiComplianceRepository item cards (statusIcon/statusLabel/statusColor, blank-form btn, submit/resubmit, history, remarks)

**Verification:** EEE-E-V1 component renders SD_ORDERS items; EEE-E-V2 submit dialog fires correct endpoint; EEE-E-V3 history drawer loads; EEE-E-V4 blank-form btn shows when `templateUrl` populated; EEE-E-V5 no CPES regression.

Keep: `ecoStats` (ECO Forms card still uses CiRepositoryCard + modal), `sdOrdersCodes`, `sdReportsCodes`, `sdCertsCodes` (ECO Forms `openRepo` still references section, and they may be used in `managedCodes`). ### EEE-A: Landing Page Tier 1 Analytics

**File:** `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/index.vue`

**Script changes:**
1. In `onMounted`, add `fetchAnalytics()` alongside `fetchProjects()` and `fetchRecentActivity()`.
2. Remove the `watch(activeTab…)` lazy-fetch guard for analytics (analytics now always fetched on mount; the Analytics tab charts already render from the same refs). Or keep the guard but it becomes a no-op since data is pre-fetched. Better: keep guard but change condition: `if (tab === 'analytics' && analyticsLoading.value === false && !analyticsSummary.value) fetchAnalytics()` (idempotent).
3. Add computed:
```typescript
const analyticsReady = computed(() => !!analyticsSummary.value && !!financialSummary.value)

// Campus bars: sorted descending by count
const campusBars = computed(() => {
  const data = (analyticsSummary.value?.by_campus || []) as Array<{ campus: string; count: number }>
  const max = Math.max(...data.map(d => d.count), 1)
  return data.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count).map(d => ({ ...d, pct: (d.count / max) * 100 }))
})

// Budget gauge: ratios relative to appropriation
const budgetGauge = computed(() => {
  const a = financialSummary.value?.total_appropriation || 0
  const o = financialSummary.value?.total_obligation || 0
  const d = financialSummary.value?.total_disbursement || 0
  return {
    appropriation: a,
    obligation: o,
    disbursement: d,
    obligationPct: a ? Math.min((o / a) * 100, 100) : 0,
    disbursementPct: a ? Math.min((d / a) * 100, 100) : 0,
  }
})

// Needs-attention: delayed + pending + rejected (max 8; capped in template)
const ATTN_LIMIT = 5
const attentionItems = computed(() =>
  projects.value.filter((p) => {
    const s = p.status?.toUpperCase()
    const ps = p.publicationStatus
    return (s === 'ONGOING' && (Number(p.physicalAccomplishment) || 0) < DELAY_THRESHOLD)
      || ps === 'PENDING_REVIEW' || ps === 'REJECTED'
  }).slice(0, ATTN_LIMIT),
)

// Status distribution pips (by_status array → label+count)
const statusPips = computed(() =>
  (analyticsSummary.value?.by_status || []).map((s: any) => ({
    status: s.status as string,
    count: s.count as number,
    color: (s.status === 'COMPLETED' || s.status === 'COMPLETE') ? 'success'
      : s.status === 'ONGOING' ? 'info'
      : s.status === 'CANCELLED' ? 'error' : 'grey',
  })),
)
```

**Template changes (Projects tab, between KPI band and filter bar):**

```html
<!-- EEE-A: Tier 1 Analytics block -->
<template v-if="analyticsReady">

  <!-- Hero strip -->
  <v-card class="mb-3 pa-4" variant="outlined">
    <v-row align="center" dense>
      <v-col cols="12" md="4">
        <div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 font-weight-medium text-uppercase">Portfolio Budget</div>
        <div class="text-h4 font-weight-bold">{{ formatCurrencyShort(stats.totalContractValue) }}</div>
        <div class="text-caption text-grey">{{ stats.total }} projects · avg {{ stats.avgProgress.toFixed(1) }}% physical progress</div>
      </v-col>
      <v-col cols="12" md="5">
        <div class="text-caption text-grey mb-1">Overall Portfolio Progress</div>
        <v-progress-linear :model-value="stats.avgProgress" height="12" rounded color="primary" />
        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1 mt-2">
          <v-chip v-for="pip in statusPips" :key="pip.status" :color="pip.color" size="x-small" variant="tonal">
            {{ pip.status }}: {{ pip.count }}
          </v-chip>
        </div>
      </v-col>
      <v-col cols="12" md="3">
        <!-- Needs-attention summary chip -->
        <v-chip v-if="attentionItems.length" color="error" variant="tonal" size="small" prepend-icon="mdi-alert">
          {{ attentionItems.length }} project{{ attentionItems.length > 1 ? 's' : '' }} need attention
        </v-chip>
        <v-chip v-else color="success" variant="tonal" size="small" prepend-icon="mdi-check-circle">
          All projects on track
        </v-chip>
      </v-col>
    </v-row>
  </v-card>

  <!-- Budget gauge + Campus bars + Needs-attention list -->
  <v-row dense class="mb-3">
    <!-- Budget gauge -->
    <v-col cols="12" md="4">
      <v-card variant="outlined" class="h-100 pa-3">
        <div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 font-weight-medium text-uppercase mb-2">Budget Utilization</div>
        <div class="mb-2">
          <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-caption mb-1">
            <span>Appropriation</span><span>{{ formatCurrencyShort(budgetGauge.appropriation) }}</span>
          </div>
          <v-progress-linear :model-value="100" height="8" rounded color="teal" />
        </div>
        <div class="mb-2">
          <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-caption mb-1">
            <span>Obligation</span><span>{{ budgetGauge.obligationPct.toFixed(1) }}%</span>
          </div>
          <v-progress-linear :model-value="budgetGauge.obligationPct" height="8" rounded color="info" />
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-caption mb-1">
            <span>Disbursement</span><span>{{ budgetGauge.disbursementPct.toFixed(1) }}%</span>
          </div>
          <v-progress-linear :model-value="budgetGauge.disbursementPct" height="8" rounded color="success" />
        </div>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <!-- Campus ranked bars -->
    <v-col cols="12" md="4">
      <v-card variant="outlined" class="h-100 pa-3">
        <div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 font-weight-medium text-uppercase mb-2">Projects by Campus</div>
        <div v-for="campus in campusBars" :key="campus.campus" class="mb-2">
          <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-caption mb-1">
            <span>{{ campus.campus || 'Unknown' }}</span><span>{{ campus.count }}</span>
          </div>
          <v-progress-linear :model-value="campus.pct" height="6" rounded color="primary" />
        </div>
        <div v-if="!campusBars.length" class="text-caption text-grey">No campus data.</div>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <!-- Needs-attention list -->
    <v-col cols="12" md="4">
      <v-card variant="outlined" class="h-100 pa-3">
        <div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 font-weight-medium text-uppercase mb-2">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-alert" size="small" color="error" class="mr-1" />Needs Attention
        </div>
        <div v-if="!attentionItems.length" class="text-caption text-grey py-2">No projects need attention.</div>
        <v-list v-else density="compact" class="pa-0">
          <v-list-item
            v-for="p in attentionItems" :key="p.id"
            class="px-0 cursor-pointer"
            @click="router.push(`/coi/detail-${p.id}`)"
          >
            <v-list-item-title class="text-caption font-weight-medium text-truncate">{{ p.projectName }}</v-list-item-title>
            <v-list-item-subtitle class="d-flex ga-1 flex-wrap mt-0">
              <v-chip v-if="p.publicationStatus === 'REJECTED'" size="x-small" color="error" variant="tonal">Rejected</v-chip>
              <v-chip v-else-if="p.publicationStatus === 'PENDING_REVIEW'" size="x-small" color="warning" variant="tonal">Pending</v-chip>
              <v-chip v-else size="x-small" color="orange" variant="tonal">Delayed</v-chip>
            </v-list-item-subtitle>
          </v-list-item>
        </v-list>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>

</template>
<!-- Loading skeleton while analytics fetch -->
<v-row v-else-if="analyticsLoading" dense class="mb-3">
  <v-col cols="12"><v-skeleton-loader type="card" /></v-col>
</v-row>
```

**Verification:** EEE-A-V1 hero strip renders on first load (no tab switch required); EEE-A-V2 budget gauge shows 3 progress bars; EEE-A-V3 campus bars sorted descending; EEE-A-V4 needs-attention list shows ≤5 items with correct badges; EEE-A-V5 analytics loading skeleton visible during fetch; EEE-A-V6 Analytics tab charts unaffected (same data refs).

### EEE-C: Project Details Dashboard Summary Panel

**File:** `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/detail-[id].vue`

**Insertion point:** Between the closing `</v-card>` of the OU-B hero card and the opening `<v-expansion-panels>` of the accordion. (Verify exact line numbers at implementation time — accordion starts around line 820 in current file.)

**New block:**
```html
<!-- EEE-C: Dashboard summary panel (additive; accordion untouched) -->
<v-expansion-panels v-if="project" class="mb-4" variant="accordion">
  <v-expansion-panel>
    <v-expansion-panel-title>
      <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-view-dashboard-outline" size="small" />
        <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">Dashboard Summary</span>
      </div>
    </v-expansion-panel-title>
    <v-expansion-panel-text>
      <v-row dense>
        <!-- Financial bar -->
        <v-col cols="12" md="5">
          <div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 font-weight-medium mb-2">Financials</div>
          <div v-if="dashFinancials.appropriation">
            <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-caption mb-1">
              <span>Contract Amount</span><span>{{ formatCurrencyShort(dashFinancials.appropriation) }}</span>
            </div>
            <v-progress-linear :model-value="100" height="6" rounded color="teal" class="mb-1" />
            <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-caption mb-1">
              <span>Obligation</span><span>{{ dashFinancials.obligationPct.toFixed(1) }}%</span>
            </div>
            <v-progress-linear :model-value="dashFinancials.obligationPct" height="6" rounded color="info" class="mb-1" />
            <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-caption mb-1">
              <span>Disbursement</span><span>{{ dashFinancials.disbursementPct.toFixed(1) }}%</span>
            </div>
            <v-progress-linear :model-value="dashFinancials.disbursementPct" height="6" rounded color="success" />
          </div>
          <div v-else class="text-caption text-grey">No financial data.</div>
        </v-col>

        <!-- Milestone progress -->
        <v-col cols="12" md="3">
          <div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 font-weight-medium mb-2">Milestones</div>
          <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 mb-1">
            <v-chip size="small" color="success" variant="tonal">
              {{ (project.milestones || []).filter((m: any) => m.status?.toUpperCase() === 'COMPLETED').length }} completed
            </v-chip>
            <span class="text-caption text-grey">/ {{ (project.milestones || []).length }} total</span>
          </div>
          <v-progress-linear
            :model-value="(project.milestones || []).length
              ? ((project.milestones || []).filter((m: any) => m.status?.toUpperCase() === 'COMPLETED').length / (project.milestones || []).length) * 100
              : 0"
            height="6" rounded color="success"
          />
        </v-col>

        <!-- Gallery thumbnails -->
        <v-col cols="12" md="4">
          <div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 font-weight-medium mb-2">Gallery ({{ gallery.length }})</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1">
            <v-img
              v-for="img in gallery.slice(0, 4)" :key="img.id"
              :src="img.imageUrl" width="56" height="56"
              cover class="rounded cursor-pointer"
              @click="activeTab = isTabVisible('documents') ? 'documents' : activeTab"
            />
            <div v-if="!gallery.length" class="text-caption text-grey">No images uploaded.</div>
          </div>
        </v-col>
      </v-row>

      <!-- Quick actions -->
      <v-divider class="my-3" />
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2">
        <v-btn v-if="isTabVisible('documents')" size="small" variant="tonal" color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-paperclip" @click="activeTab = 'documents'">Documents</v-btn>
        <v-btn v-if="isTabVisible('progress')" size="small" variant="tonal" color="info" prepend-icon="mdi-flag-checkered" @click="activeTab = 'progress'">Milestones</v-btn>
        <v-btn v-if="isTabVisible('team')" size="small" variant="tonal" color="teal" prepend-icon="mdi-account-group-outline" @click="activeTab = 'team'">Team</v-btn>
      </div>
    </v-expansion-panel-text>
  </v-expansion-panel>
</v-expansion-panels>
```

**Computed `dashFinancials` (add to script near `progressSummary`):**
```typescript
const dashFinancials = computed(() => {
  const financials: any[] = project.value?.financials || []
  const appropr = financials.reduce((s: number, f: any) => s + (Number(f.appropriation) || 0), 0)
    || (Number(project.value?.totalContractAmount) || 0)
  const oblig = financials.reduce((s: number, f: any) => s + (Number(f.obligation) || 0), 0)
  const disb = financials.reduce((s: number, f: any) => s + (Number(f.disbursement) || 0), 0)
  return {
    appropriation: appropr,
    obligationPct: appropr ? Math.min((oblig / appropr) * 100, 100) : 0,
    disbursementPct: appropr ? Math.min((disb / appropr) * 100, 100) : 0,
  }
})
```

**Verification:** EEE-C-V1 dashboard summary panel renders above accordion; EEE-C-V2 financial bar shows 3-level progress; EEE-C-V3 milestone chip shows correct completed/total count; EEE-C-V4 gallery thumbnails show up to 4 images; EEE-C-V5 quick actions switch tabs correctly; EEE-C-V6 accordion panels untouched (8 panels present and functional); EEE-C-V7 no new API calls.

### EEE-D: CiRepositoryModal Improvements

**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiRepositoryModal.vue`

**D1 — Toolbar grid:** Replace the `d-flex align-center ga-2 flex-wrap px-4 pt-3` container with `v-row dense class="px-4 pt-3 align-center"`:
```html
<v-row dense class="px-4 pt-3 align-center">
  <v-col cols="12" sm="6" md="5">
    <v-text-field v-model="modalSearch" prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify" placeholder="Search files…"
      variant="outlined" density="compact" hide-details single-line clearable clear-icon="mdi-close-circle-outline" />
  </v-col>
  <v-col cols="12" sm="4" md="4">
    <v-select v-model="modalFilterType" :items="typeFilterItems" label="Type"
      variant="outlined" density="compact" hide-details clearable />
  </v-col>
  <v-col cols="12" sm="2" md="3" class="d-flex justify-end align-center ga-2">
    <v-btn-toggle v-model="modalSort" mandatory density="compact" variant="outlined">
      <v-btn value="date-desc" icon="mdi-sort-calendar-descending" size="small" density="compact" />
      <v-btn value="date-asc" icon="mdi-sort-calendar-ascending" size="small" density="compact" />
      <v-btn value="name-asc" icon="mdi-sort-alphabetical-ascending" size="small" density="compact" />
    </v-btn-toggle>
    <v-btn v-if="canUpload && mode !== 'view'" :color="color" variant="tonal" size="small"
      :icon="showUpload ? 'mdi-chevron-up' : 'mdi-upload'"
      @click="showUpload = !showUpload" />
  </v-col>
</v-row>
```

**D2 — Upload guidance:** Inside the drag zone `div`, after the cloud icon:
```html
<div class="text-body-2 text-grey mt-1">Drag files here or click to browse</div>
<div class="text-caption text-grey-darken-1 mt-1">Accepted: PDF, Word, Excel, images, ZIP · Max 20 MB per file</div>
```

**D3 — Metadata enrichment in doc list subtitle:** Add fileSize + lifecycleStatus to `v-list-item-subtitle`:
```html
<v-list-item-subtitle class="text-caption">
  {{ typeLabel(doc.documentType) }}
  <span v-if="doc.uploadedByName"> · {{ doc.uploadedByName }}</span>
  <span v-if="doc.createdAt"> · {{ formatDate(doc.createdAt) }}</span>
  <span v-if="doc.version != null"> · v{{ doc.version }}</span>
  <span v-if="doc.fileSize"> · {{ formatSize(doc.fileSize) }}</span>
  <v-chip v-if="doc.lifecycleStatus && doc.lifecycleStatus !== 'ACTIVE'" size="x-small" variant="tonal" color="grey" class="ml-1">{{ doc.lifecycleStatus }}</v-chip>
</v-list-item-subtitle>
```
Add `formatSize(bytes: number): string` helper:
```typescript
function formatSize(bytes: number): string {
  if (bytes >= 1_048_576) return `${(bytes / 1_048_576).toFixed(1)} MB`
  if (bytes >= 1024) return `${(bytes / 1024).toFixed(0)} KB`
  return `${bytes} B`
}
```
Also add `fileSize?: number` to the `RepoDoc` interface.

**Verification:** EEE-D-V1 toolbar single row at ≥sm (no wrap); EEE-D-V2 sort toggle buttons uniform height with search field; EEE-D-V3 upload zone shows accepted-formats guidance; EEE-D-V4 doc list shows fileSize when populated; EEE-D-V5 no regression in search/filter/pagination.

# PHASE FFF — COI Enterprise Refactor (Detail Grid · Nested Folders · Checklist-as-Tracker · Timeline Removal · Timelogs)

> **ACE Phase 2 artifact — FROZEN pending per-group Phase 3 authorization.**
> Research: §2.254 (decisions D-FFF-1…D-FFF-4). Branch: `pmo-coi`.
> **Delivery is PHASED (D-FFF-4): each Group below requires its own `RUN_ACE` Phase-3 authorization. No code until authorized.**

## Governance directives (FFF)

- **FFF-D1** Backend route base `/api/construction-projects` is IMMUTABLE; folder + timelog work uses ADDITIVE sub-resources only (`:id/document-folders`, existing `:id/timeline-entries`).
- **FFF-D2** `construction_timeline_entries` MUST NOT be dropped — it backs Timelogs and MOV (`relatedEntityType=TIMELINE_ENTRY`).
- **FFF-D3** Seeded taxonomy (`construction_document_types` groupCode/typeCode/data) and seeded `templateUrl` blank forms are READONLY — never mutate or delete. Templates are LINKED into TEMPLATE folders, never moved.
- **FFF-D4** `CiAttachmentHub` remains the ONLY attachment renderer (ZY-D1). New folder UI lives inside its window-items.
- **FFF-D5** Frontend interfaces ONLY in `utils/adapters.ts` (JB-D3). `api.del()` not `api.delete()`.
- **FFF-D6** Existing flat documents (`folderId=null`) must continue to render and remain editable post-migration (back-compat).
- **FFF-D7** Checklist remains TRACKING-ONLY after FFF-D — no upload/edit/delete affordances inside it; all mutations happen in the repository surfaces.
- **FFF-D8** Detail / New / Edit must stay synchronized (shared field structure + shared CiAttachmentHub); changes propagate through the shared component, not per-page forks.
- **FFF-D9** Checklist sync stays `documentType`-driven regardless of folder placement (folders are organisational only).

---

## GROUP 1 — Detail Grid Layout + Progress Readability + Timelogs (lower risk, high visible value)

### FFF-A — Project Details grid layout (Part 1)
1. Add Row-1 grid to `detail-[id].vue` Overview: `v-row` → LEFT `v-col cols=12 md=7` carousel gallery (`v-carousel`, reuse `gallery`/`profileImages`, responsive height, image preview), RIGHT `v-col cols=12 md=5` always-expanded **Project Profile** card (NOT collapsible): status chip, timeline (start/target/duration), budget summary, implementing agencies, quick statistics.
2. Convert remaining Overview sections to collapsible **2-per-row grid**: wrap existing `v-expansion-panels`/cards in `v-row` with `v-col cols=12 md=6`; collapse to single column < md.
3. HCI: visual grouping, consistent card headers/icons, reduced whitespace, progressive disclosure retained for non-profile sections.
4. Constraint: presentation only — no data fetch / endpoint / adapter changes. Verify existing Overview content (profile images, publication strip, EEE-C dashboard summary) is preserved within the new grid.

### FFF-B — Progress Reports readability + Timelogs container (Parts 5/7)
5. Readability pass on `CiProgressReportTab.vue`: promote primary data (% completion, costs, report identity) from `text-caption`/`text-body-2` to `text-body-1`/`text-subtitle-2`; enlarge stat values; keep table/card/list views but legible. No logic change.
6. New `CiTimelogsContainer.vue` rendered **below** Progress Reports in the Progress tab. Backed by `construction_timeline_entries` (`GET :id/timeline-entries`), no new table.
7. Timelogs features: weekly + monthly entries (entryType WEEKLY/MONTHLY for now), timeline cards (title, period, work accomplished, issues, manpower/weather, photosCount, MOV link), search, sorting, uploader metadata, audit-log linkage, progress/accomplishment summary.
8. **Advanced filters** (relocate + reuse the existing Timeline-tab filter logic): Year, Quarter (multi-select), Month (multi-select), Custom Range, combined; responsive chips; client-side filter over fetched entries (server-safe query params optional). Example: Year=2024 + Q1,Q2 + Mar,Jun shows only matching records.
9. Readable fonts in Timelogs (text-body-1 for accomplishments/notes).
10. Create/edit Timelog entries reuse existing timeline-entry CRUD endpoints (Admin/Staff gated); read-only for Viewer/Auditor.

---

## GROUP 2 — Timeline Tab Removal (Part 6)

### FFF-C — Remove Timeline tab, relocate content (D-FFF-3)
11. Remove Timeline tab: `detail-[id].vue` tab def (L1302–1304), `DETAIL_TAB_ORDER` entry (L50), tab-key maps (L32/L194), quick-action button (L1201–1205), the `value="timeline"` `v-window-item` (L1957+).
12. Relocate **Milestones** into the Progress tab; rename tab label to "Progress & Milestones" (milestones table + CiBatchMilestoneDialog move here).
13. Fold **Project Diary / Work-Log** into the `CiTimelogsContainer` (FFF-B); **drop** the standalone Calendar view + calendar state (L718–818) + view-mode toggle (L819–820).
14. Remove now-orphaned timeline-only computeds/refs/dialogs in `detail-[id].vue` (milestone+work-log detail dialogs L623–717, calendar computeds) only after confirming no other references (Grep gate).
15. Tab visibility: deprecate `tabTimeline` usage in tab config / `isTabVisible`; ensure no broken `isTabVisible('timeline')` references remain.
16. **Backend untouched** (FFF-D2): timeline-entries entity, repo, controller CRUD, MOV linkage all preserved (now consumed by Timelogs). Verify `npx nuxt typecheck` shows no new errors and no dangling timeline references via Grep.

---

## GROUP 3 — Checklist Refactor + Nested Folder System + Page Sync (highest risk, schema)

### FFF-D — Document Checklist as tracking-only (Part 3)
17. Strip direct mutations from `CiDocumentChecklist.vue`: remove submit/resubmit dialog (L80–110, `api.upload` to submissions) and any delete/edit affordances.
18. Each checklist row → readable grid: status indicator, submission counter, remarks indicator, completion indicator, **"Go to repository" redirect button** (reuse existing `navigate` emit → `onChecklistNavigate` maps group to the correct surface: Key/Supporting/Other Forms/Misc/Compliance).
19. **List-based remarks**: upgrade per-group remarks from single string to `{text, author, timestamp}[]` (reuse jsonb list pattern + `CiBulletListInput`/`CiRemarksLog`); chronological history; editable only by authorized roles. Requires additive backend: extend `/document-remarks` to accept list shape OR new `remarksList` jsonb (decide at FFF-D start; additive only).
20. Enterprise styling: structured spacing, reduced clutter, scan-friendly.

### FFF-E — Nested folder backend schema (Part 2 backend, D-FFF-1)
21. New entity `construction_document_folders` (§2.254-H): id, projectId, parentId (self-FK CASCADE), name, kind ENUM(ROOT,FOLDER,FORM,TEMPLATE,SUBMISSION), groupCode, sortOrder, createdBy, timestamps; index (projectId, parentId). Register in module.
22. Add nullable `folderId uuid` to `documents` (FK to folders, ON DELETE SET NULL). MikroORM migration (additive; existing rows folderId=null).
23. Additive endpoints on the immutable base: `GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE :id/document-folders` (recursive tree assembled server-side); `POST :id/documents` accepts optional `folderId`; RBAC Admin/Staff for mutation, all-roles read.
24. FORM-folder creation auto-creates TEMPLATE + SUBMISSION children. Seeded `templateUrl` blank forms surfaced (linked) inside TEMPLATE folders — never moved/deleted (FFF-D3).
25. Checklist/submissions remain authoritative for seeded SD/ECO compliance; folders are additive (FFF-D9). Verify checklist auto-sync still fires on folder-scoped uploads.

### FFF-F — Nested folder frontend + label changes (Parts 2/4/5, D-FFF-4)
26. New recursive `CiFolderRepository.vue` (inside CiAttachmentHub window-items, ZY-D1): breadcrumbs, tree/grid-list toggle, folder metadata, folder permissions, expandable tree, drag-drop upload into folder, upload inside nested folders, recursive container rendering.
27. Apply uniformly to: Key Documents, Supporting Documents, Other Forms, Miscellaneous & Uncategorized, Compliance Repository.
28. Template folder: stores official template, downloadable, replaceable by admin/editor, version-aware (reuse submissions/version). Submission folder: accomplished submissions, linked to template, multi-upload, uploader metadata + timestamps + audit logs preserved.
29. **Label changes:** "ECO Forms" → "Other Forms"; "Blank Forms" → "Download Template" (display only; no seeded-data mutation, FFF-D3).
30. Upload/download lifecycle preserved: download template → accomplish externally → reupload submission → audit metadata + repository integrity intact.
31. Interfaces added to `utils/adapters.ts` only (FFF-D5).

### FFF-G — Detail / New / Edit synchronization (global requirement, D-FFF-8)
32. Verify field-structure parity across `detail-[id].vue`, `new.vue`, `edit-[id].vue` (shared CiAttachmentHub + matching profile field set from FFF-A).
33. Ensure repository structure, attachment ecosystem, UI language, and component architecture are identical across the three pages.
34. Regression gate per group: `npx nuxt typecheck` (no NEW errors in touched files), operator browser smoke (RBAC view/edit/staging, existing tabs, upload/download lifecycle, seeded templates intact).

|---|---|
| GGG-D1 | `detail-[id].vue` MUST contain zero add/create/upload/edit/delete buttons or CRUD modals |

| GGG-D3 | `COI_PROJECT_TABS` is the canonical tab registry — remove `timeline` entry; all consumers update automatically |

| GGG-D7 | `construction_timeline_entries` table is NOT dropped (FFF-D2) — timeline entries = timelogs |
| GGG-D8 | Nested folder system is ADDITIVE — no existing columns/rows removed |
| GGG-D9 | `CiPersonnelAccessCard.vue` normalizePermissions() legacy migration code (tabTimeline→tabDatesDuration) MUST be preserved |
| GGG-D10 | `api.del()` (not `api.delete()`) for all DELETE calls |

## GGG-D: Checklist Refactor (Tracking-Only)

**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiDocumentChecklist.vue`

### GGG-D Steps

**D1: Remove inline file submission**

Remove:
- `submitDialog`, `submitDialogItem`, `submitFile`, `submitNotes`, `submittingVersion` refs
- `openSubmitDialog()` and `saveSubmission()` functions
- `submitDialog` v-dialog from template
- Any "Submit" / "Upload" / "Resubmit" buttons in checklist item rows

**D2: Add "View in Repository" redirect button**

For each checklist item (or per group), add a button that calls:
```ts
emit('navigate', { groupCode: item.documentType?.groupCode, typeCode: item.documentType?.typeCode })
```
Label: "View in Repository →" or "Go to [groupLabel] →"

The parent page (detail or edit) handles `navigate` by switching to the Documents tab and opening the correct section.

**D3: Keep status tracking (admin-only)**

The status update dialog (review/approve/reject) with `canEdit` guard may remain — this is administrative tracking, not file CRUD. Keep the status-change workflow but ensure it does not expose upload controls.

**D4: Upgrade remarks to list-based system**

Change `groupRemarks` prop type from `Record<string, string>` to `Record<string, RemarkEntry[]>`:
```ts
interface RemarkEntry {
  text: string
  author?: string
  timestamp: string
}
```

Update `remarksUpdate` emit to pass `RemarkEntry[]` instead of `string`.

Update parent pages (detail-[id].vue, edit-[id].vue) to pass and handle new remarks shape.

Update template to render remarks list per group (chronological, each entry shows author + timestamp).

**D5: Add new remark input in edit mode**

When `canEditRemarks=true`, show a text field + "Add Remark" button. On submit, prepend new `RemarkEntry` with current user + timestamp.

### GGG-D Verification
- [ ] No upload buttons in checklist
- [ ] "View in Repository" buttons redirect to correct section
- [ ] Remarks render as chronological list
- [ ] Author + timestamp visible per remark entry
- [ ] Status tracking (admin) still functional

## GGG-F: Nested Folder System — Backend

### Files
- `pmo-backend/src/university-operations/construction-projects/` (or equivalent COI backend module)
- New migration file (next available number after current highest)
- New entity: `ConstructionDocumentFolder`
- Modified entity: `ConstructionDocument` (add nullable `folderId`)

### GGG-F Steps

**F1: Identify current migration highest number**

Check `database/migrations/` for highest existing number (currently ~047+).

**F2: Create ConstructionDocumentFolder entity (MikroORM)**

```ts
@Entity({ tableName: 'construction_document_folders' })
export class ConstructionDocumentFolder {
  @PrimaryKey({ type: 'uuid', defaultRaw: 'gen_random_uuid()' })
  id: string

  @ManyToOne(() => ConstructionProject, { fieldName: 'project_id' })
  project: ConstructionProject

  @ManyToOne(() => ConstructionDocumentFolder, { nullable: true, fieldName: 'parent_folder_id' })
  parentFolder?: ConstructionDocumentFolder | null

  @OneToMany(() => ConstructionDocumentFolder, f => f.parentFolder)
  children = new Collection<ConstructionDocumentFolder>(this)

  @Property({ columnType: 'varchar(255)' })
  folderName: string

  @Property({ columnType: 'varchar(50)', default: 'GENERAL' })
  folderType: 'GENERAL' | 'TEMPLATE' | 'SUBMISSIONS' = 'GENERAL'

  @Property({ columnType: 'varchar(100)', nullable: true })
  groupCode?: string | null

  @Property({ default: 0 })
  sortOrder: number = 0

  @Property({ onCreate: () => new Date(), columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  createdAt: Date = new Date()

  @Property({ onUpdate: () => new Date(), columnType: 'timestamptz' })
  updatedAt: Date = new Date()
}
```

**F3: Create MikroORM migration**

Migration creates `construction_document_folders` and adds nullable `folder_id` to `construction_documents`:
```sql
CREATE TABLE construction_document_folders (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES construction_projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  parent_folder_id UUID REFERENCES construction_document_folders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  folder_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  folder_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GENERAL',
  group_code VARCHAR(100),
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

ALTER TABLE construction_documents 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS folder_id UUID REFERENCES construction_document_folders(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;
```

**F4: Add DTOs**

```ts
// CreateDocumentFolderDto
export class CreateDocumentFolderDto {
  @IsString() @IsNotEmpty() folder_name: string
  @IsOptional() @IsUUID() parent_folder_id?: string
  @IsOptional() @IsIn(['GENERAL','TEMPLATE','SUBMISSIONS']) folder_type?: string
  @IsOptional() @IsString() group_code?: string
  @IsOptional() @IsInt() sort_order?: number
}

// UpdateDocumentFolderDto
export class UpdateDocumentFolderDto {
  @IsOptional() @IsString() folder_name?: string
  @IsOptional() @IsInt() sort_order?: number
}
```

**F5: Add service methods**

In `ConstructionProjectsService`:
- `getFolders(projectId)` — return tree (nested children) or flat list
- `createFolder(projectId, dto)` — create folder, verify project exists
- `updateFolder(projectId, folderId, dto)` — rename/reorder
- `deleteFolder(projectId, folderId)` — cascade delete (MikroORM handles children + SET NULL on docs)
- `assignDocumentToFolder(projectId, docId, folderId | null)` — PATCH document's folderId

**F6: Add controller endpoints**

```ts
@Get(':id/document-folders')
getFolders(@Param('id') id: string)

@Post(':id/document-folders')
createFolder(@Param('id') id: string, @Body() dto: CreateDocumentFolderDto)

@Patch(':id/document-folders/:folderId')
updateFolder(@Param('id') id: string, @Param('folderId') folderId: string, @Body() dto: UpdateDocumentFolderDto)

@Delete(':id/document-folders/:folderId')
deleteFolder(@Param('id') id: string, @Param('folderId') folderId: string)

@Patch(':id/documents/:docId')
assignDocumentFolder(@Param('id') id: string, @Param('docId') docId: string, @Body() body: { folder_id?: string | null })
```

All endpoints gated by existing project-level RBAC guards.

### GGG-F Verification
- [ ] Migration runs cleanly (up/down)
- [ ] GET :id/document-folders returns tree
- [ ] POST, PATCH, DELETE functional
- [ ] Existing documents unaffected (folder_id nullable, defaults null)
- [ ] Seeded templates unaffected

---

## GGG-G: Nested Folder System — Frontend

### Files
- New: `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiFolderRepository.vue`
- Modified: `pmo-frontend/utils/adapters.ts` (new folder interfaces)
- Modified: `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiAttachmentHub.vue`

### GGG-G Steps

**G1: Add folder interfaces to utils/adapters.ts**

```ts
export interface CiDocumentFolder {
  id: string
  projectId: string
  parentFolderId: string | null
  folderName: string
  folderType: 'GENERAL' | 'TEMPLATE' | 'SUBMISSIONS'
  groupCode?: string | null
  sortOrder?: number
  createdAt?: string
  updatedAt?: string
  children?: CiDocumentFolder[]
  documents?: CiHubDoc[]  // reuse or define locally
}
```

**G2: Create CiFolderRepository.vue**

Recursive component. Props:
```ts
interface Props {
  projectId: string
  folders: CiDocumentFolder[]
  groupCode: string
  canManage?: boolean
  canUpload?: boolean
  canDelete?: boolean
  mode?: 'view' | 'edit'
}
```

Features:
- Expandable folder tree (v-expansion-panels or custom accordion)
- Folder types: GENERAL (📁), TEMPLATE (📋), SUBMISSIONS (📤) — distinct icons
- "Create Folder" button (canManage, edit mode)
- "Create Subfolder" within parent folder
- Rename / Delete folder actions (canManage, edit mode)
- File list within each folder (filtered by folder's documents)
- Upload within folder (canUpload, edit mode)
- Breadcrumb trail when navigating nested levels
- Repository breadcrumbs: `[Group] > [Parent Folder] > [Current Folder]`

**G3: Integrate CiFolderRepository into CiAttachmentHub.vue**

For repository sections that support nested folders (ECO_FORMS, SD_ORDERS, SD_REPORTS, SD_CERTS, CPES_DOCS, and Others):
1. Add `fetchFolders()` function to load `GET :id/document-folders` (filter by groupCode)
2. Pass `folders` prop to `CiFolderRepository`
3. Folder management only available when `props.mode === 'edit'` and `props.canUpload`
4. View mode shows read-only expandable folder tree with file lists

**G4: Preserve flat mode for Key Documents**

Key Documents (KEY_DOC_TYPECODES group) does NOT get folder system — remains flat list with type-based sections. Key Docs section uses `CiRepositoryModal` pattern as before.

### GGG-G Verification

- [ ] Nested folders render recursively (at least 3 levels deep)
- [ ] Template / Submissions folder types visually distinct
- [ ] Files display within correct folders
- [ ] Flat mode preserved for Key Documents
- [ ] View mode shows read-only tree (no CRUD buttons)

## PHASE GGG-R — Operator Prompt Alignment Refresh (Phase 2, Frozen)

> Reference: `research.md` §2.256  
> Intent: align the existing GGG plan to the expanded enterprise prompt (nested repository, checklist tracking-only, kebab action governance, WAR/MPR timelog fidelity) without starting implementation.

### GGG-R Directives

- **GGG-R1** Do not mutate seeded taxonomy records (`groupCode`, `typeCode`, seeded templates).
- **GGG-R2** Keep immutable route base `/api/construction-projects`; add only sub-resources.
- **GGG-R3** Detail page remains strictly view-only.
- **GGG-R4** `CiAttachmentHub` stays single attachment renderer (ZY-D1).
- **GGG-R5** All actionable icons in new/edit flows move behind kebab menus.

### Ordered execution steps (for future Phase 3 only)

1. **GGG-RA — Detail page visual verification lock**
   - Keep current row-1 carousel+profile and read-only enforcement.
   - Apply only spacing/typography refinements for 2-column collapsible grid consistency.

2. **GGG-RB — Checklist tracking-only conversion**
   - Remove checklist upload/submission actions.
   - Keep status/compliance indicators and repository redirects.
   - Migrate remarks from string to list entries (`text`, `author`, `timestamp`).

3. **GGG-RC — Label governance**
   - Replace UI labels: **ECO Forms → Other Forms**, **Blank Form(s) → Download Template**.
   - Preserve backend codes (`ECO_FORMS`, etc.) untouched.

4. **GGG-RD — Nested folder backend**
   - Add `construction_document_folders` + nullable `folder_id` in `documents`.
   - Add CRUD/list endpoints for folder trees under project sub-resource routes.

5. **GGG-RE — Nested folder frontend**
   - Introduce recursive folder component and integrate inside `CiAttachmentHub`.
   - Apply to Key Docs, Supporting Docs, Other Forms, Compliance, Misc.
   - Enforce parent → form → template/submissions hierarchy pattern.

6. **GGG-RF — Timelog fidelity uplift (WAR/MPR)**
   - Keep `construction_timeline_entries` as authoritative source.
   - Add WAR/MPR-aligned metadata capture (report reference + structured accomplishment/sign-off context) without breaking existing filters.
   - Preserve order: Progress Reports, Milestones, Timelogs.

7. **GGG-RG — Kebab action governance (new/edit pages)**
   - Move row/card action icons (edit/delete/upload/resubmit/manage actions) into kebab menus across new/edit repository/progress/timelog/checklist surfaces.
   - Keep role gates unchanged.

### Acceptance lock (GGG-R)

| Requirement | Target step |
|---|---|
| Detail page remains view-only | GGG-RA |
| Checklist has no upload/edit/delete repository CRUD | GGG-RB |
| Checklist redirects to repository by context | GGG-RB |
| Remarks list history works | GGG-RB |
| Other Forms / Download Template labels visible | GGG-RC |
| Recursive folders + template/submissions flow works | GGG-RD/RE |
| Timelog WAR/MPR-aligned data entry fields available | GGG-RF |
| Year/Quarter/Month/Date-range filtering preserved | GGG-RF |
| Action icons routed through kebab toggles | GGG-RG |

### GGG-R Status (2026-05-28)

- ✅ **GGG-RA** (detail page view-only): CiTimelogsContainer forced read-only this session. Orphaned script code (A1) and A2–A5 checks still pending.
- ✅ **GGG-RC** (label governance): partially — `COI_PROJECT_TABS` and `tabOrder` have no timeline entry. ECO/Blank Forms label changes not yet done.
- ⬜ **GGG-RB** (checklist tracking-only): not started.
- ⬜ **GGG-RD/RE** (nested folder backend/frontend): not started.
- ⬜ **GGG-RF** (timelog WAR/MPR fidelity): not started.
- ⬜ **GGG-RG** (kebab action governance): not started.

**STATUS: Phase GGG-R plan FROZEN. Partial implementation of GGG-RA and GGG-RC through earlier sessions. Full GGG-R Phase 3 authorization required for remaining steps.**

# PHASE HHH — COI Enterprise Repository & Progress Workspace Refactor

**Date:** 2026-05-28  
**Branch:** pmo-coi  
**Research:** `research.md` §2.259  
**Status:** Phase 2 FROZEN — Awaiting Phase 3 authorization per group  
**Supersedes:** GGG-R (for GGG-RF, GGG-RG scope overlaps); GGG-S (for GGG-SB scope)  
**Primary files:** `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/edit-[id].vue`, `pmo-frontend/pages/coi/new.vue`, `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiRevisionOrdersTable.vue`, `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiTimelogsContainer.vue`, `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiAttachmentHub.vue`, `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiDocumentChecklist.vue`

## HHH Governance Directives

| # | Directive |
|---|---|
| HHH-D1 | `CiAttachmentHub.vue` (ZY-D1) remains the ONLY attachment renderer — no new parallel upload surfaces |
| HHH-D2 | `utils/adapters.ts` is the ONLY place for new frontend type interfaces (folder types go here) |
| HHH-D3 | Backend route base `/api/construction-projects` is IMMUTABLE — folder/timelog work uses existing sub-resources only |
| HHH-D4 | Seeded taxonomy (`document_types` table) is READONLY — `groupCode`/`typeCode`/`templateUrl` never mutated |
| HHH-D5 | `construction_timeline_entries` is NOT dropped — Timelogs reuse it |
| HHH-D6 | ECO_FORMS backend groupCode is READONLY — "Other Forms" display label already applied in CiAttachmentHub |
| HHH-D7 | `api.del()` not `api.delete()` for all DELETE calls |
| HHH-D8 | Folder node types: CONTAINER (group/named folder), FORM (named form), TEMPLATE (template child), SUBMISSION (submission child) — frontend convention only, no DB enum change |
| HHH-D9 | Existing flat documents (folderId=null) must continue to render post-folder integration — backward-compat required |
| HHH-D10 | `detail-[id].vue` remains strictly view-only — no CRUD affordances added by this phase |

## GROUP 2 — Nested Folder System (Medium Risk, Schema)

### HHH-E: Document folderId FK Verification + Migration (if needed)

**Files:** `pmo-backend/src/database/entities/document.entity.ts`, `database/migrations/`

**E1: Verify Document entity has folderId column**  
Read `document.entity.ts`. If `folderId` property exists → no migration needed. If absent → create additive migration: `ALTER TABLE documents ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS folder_id uuid REFERENCES construction_document_folders(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;` + add `@Property({ nullable: true, columnType: 'uuid' }) folderId?: string | null;` to entity.

**E2: Verify DTO accepts folder_id**  
Read `create-document.dto.ts` / upload endpoint. Confirm `folder_id?: string` (optional) is accepted. If not, add `@IsOptional() @IsUUID() folder_id?: string` to the upload DTO.

**E3: Verify service uses folderId**  
`construction-projects.service.ts` lines ~1984–2025: Service already handles `dto.folder_id` and maps to `folderId` on entity. Confirm `persistDoc` path reaches this code.

**E4: Add FolderTree type to adapters.ts**  
```ts
export interface FolderNode {
  id: string
  projectId: string
  parentId: string | null
  folderName: string
  groupCode: string | null
  nodeType: 'CONTAINER' | 'FORM' | 'TEMPLATE' | 'SUBMISSION' | string
  sortOrder: number
  children: FolderNode[]
  createdAt: string
  updatedAt: string
}
```

### HHH-E Verification
- [ ] `documents` table has `folder_id` column (nullable)
- [ ] Document upload payload accepts optional `folder_id`
- [ ] `FolderNode` type exported from `utils/adapters.ts`
- [ ] No existing document rows affected (all folderId=null)

---

### HHH-F: CiFolderRepository.vue — Recursive Frontend Component

**File:** New `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiFolderRepository.vue`

**F1: Component contract**  
Props:
```ts
{ projectId: string, groupCode: string, canEdit?: boolean, canDelete?: boolean }
```
- Fetches `GET /api/construction-projects/:id/document-folders` on mount → filters by `groupCode`
- Maintains local `folders: FolderNode[]` (tree from API)
- Maintains `documents` prop or fetches `GET :id/documents?groupCode=...` for folder-scoped display

**F2: Folder tree rendering**  
Recursive `v-expansion-panels` or accordion pattern:
- Root level: top-level CONTAINERs with expand/collapse chevron + folder icon + count badge
- Child folders: recursive self-call (`<CiFolderRepository>` inside expansion panel) OR flat recursive v-treeview
- TEMPLATE nodes: lock icon, "Download Template" button (templateUrl or attached file), "Replace Template" (canEdit only)
- SUBMISSION nodes: upload zone, uploaded file list, metadata (uploader, timestamp, version)

**F3: Folder CRUD toolbar (canEdit only)**  
Each CONTAINER/FORM node header has kebab → {Rename, Add Child Folder, Add Form, Delete (if empty)}.
- "Add Child Folder" → dialog → `POST :id/document-folders` with `parent_id: currentNode.id, node_type: 'CONTAINER'`
- "Add Form" → dialog → `POST :id/document-folders` with `parent_id: currentNode.id, node_type: 'FORM'` → auto-creates TEMPLATE + SUBMISSION children

**F4: Auto-create TEMPLATE + SUBMISSION on FORM creation**  
After creating a FORM node, immediately `POST` two children:
1. `{ folder_name: 'Template', node_type: 'TEMPLATE', parent_id: formId }`
2. `{ folder_name: 'Submissions', node_type: 'SUBMISSION', parent_id: formId }`

**F5: Upload within folder**  
SUBMISSION nodes render a drag-drop upload zone. On file drop/select: `persistDoc({ file, documentType: firstTypeOfGroupCode, folder_id: submissionNode.id })`.  
TEMPLATE nodes render: existing template download button + "Replace Template" upload (overwrites with new version).

**F6: Breadcrumbs**  
Track active path via `breadcrumb: FolderNode[]` ref. Click breadcrumb = collapse to that level.

**F7: Document list within folder**  
Documents with matching `folderId` rendered inside the folder's expansion panel:
- File row: icon + fileName + uploadedByName + createdAt + download button + delete button (canDelete).

### HHH-F Verification
- [ ] Top-level CONTAINER folders visible per groupCode
- [ ] Expand/collapse works recursively
- [ ] "Add Form" creates FORM + TEMPLATE + SUBMISSION children
- [ ] Files uploaded into SUBMISSION folder have correct folderId
- [ ] Template download/replace works
- [ ] Breadcrumbs track active path
- [ ] Existing flat docs (folderId=null) still appear under their group section (not inside folders)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors

### HHH-G: CiAttachmentHub Integration + Supporting Docs Preset Folders

**File:** `pmo-frontend/components/coi/CiAttachmentHub.vue`

**G1: Supporting Documents section — add CiFolderRepository**  
In `v-window-item value="supporting"`, below each `CiSupportingDocsRepository` component, add:
```vue
<CiFolderRepository :project-id="projectId" group-code="SD_ORDERS" :can-edit="canUpload" :can-delete="canDelete" />
```
(Repeat for SD_REPORTS, SD_CERTS, ECO_FORMS.)  
Ensure CiSupportingDocsRepository (the checklist-backed per-type form) stays ABOVE the folder repository (existing workflow preserved first, folders additive below).

**G2: Other Forms section — add CiFolderRepository**  
Replace the flat `CiRepositoryCard` "Other Forms" with:
1. Keep `CiRepositoryCard` for flat/non-folder uploads (backward-compat for existing ECO_FORMS docs)
2. Add `<CiFolderRepository group-code="ECO_FORMS" ...>` below it for the nested folder workspace.

**G3: Miscellaneous section — add CiFolderRepository**  
In `v-window-item value="other"`, add `<CiFolderRepository group-code="MISC" ...>` for user-created folders in the uncategorized section.

**G4: Lazy seed 4 preset CONTAINER folders for Supporting Docs**  
When user first opens the supporting documents section (watch on `activeSection === 'supporting'`):
- Check if groupCode folders already exist for SD_ORDERS/SD_REPORTS/SD_CERTS/ECO_FORMS.
- If not, `POST :id/document-folders` for each missing one with `{ folder_name: labelForGroup, group_code: code, node_type: 'CONTAINER', sort_order: index }`.
- This is lazy/idempotent — runs once per project per browser session.

**G5: Fetch folder tree in CiAttachmentHub**  
Add `fetchFolders()` function: `GET :id/document-folders` → store in `folders: FolderNode[]`. Called in `onMounted` when `hasProject`. Pass `folders` down to `CiFolderRepository` as prop OR let CiFolderRepository fetch independently (simpler — independent fetch per component).
